programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Fagin
programme.desc: The team is called to an in-progress bank robbery and find a detective trying to take over the crime scene. As the robberies continue to be executed around the city, Lindsay is forced to make a decision in the heat of the moment.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Army of One
programme.desc: A live video is streamed online showcasing a tortured man being beaten and burned alive. Upon further investigation, the victim's identity is traced back to that of a man who had been locked up for statutory rape.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Fork in the Road
programme.desc: When Lindsay receives a panicked phone call from her mother, Bunny, whose boyfriend has just been shot, Lindsay must figure out the best way to approach the situation as her mother is now the main suspect.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Reform
programme.desc: The district is in a state of change, Lindsay has moved to New York and the CPD is under scrutiny about the corrupt nature of its institution. The team attempts to bust a gun deal that quickly turns dicey when innocent people get involved.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Thing About Heroes
programme.desc: After a van explodes during a Chicago street festival, Muslim patrol officer Frank Toma goes missing and evidence piles up pointing to his involvement, but Burgess is desperate to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Promise
programme.desc: When a young Latina woman is brutally murdered, Intelligence suspects she may have been working as a drug mule.

programme.title: Rudolph, the Red-Nosed Reindeer

programme.title: Movie: How the Grinch Stole Christmas

programme.title: Movie: Home Alone
programme.desc: A young boy is accidentally left at home when his family goes away for Christmas vacation. He must fend for himself as he faces burglars, scary neighbours and other obstacles. At first he enjoys his freedom, but soon wants his family back for Christmas.

programme.title: Movie: Home Alone 2: Lost in New York
programme.desc: A young boy mistakenly takes the wrong plane when his family goes on Christmas vacation and ends up in New York City, fending off suspicious hotel staff, a kindly bird woman in disguise and two burglars he fought against last Christmas.

programme.title: Santa Claus Is Comin' to Town
programme.desc: Kris Kringle overcomes the evil Burgermeister Meisterburger who has banned toys from the land of Sombertown. With the help of Mother Nature, magical elves and special reindeer, he is able to deliver toys to children all over the world.

programme.desc: In 1980, the entire world was stunned by the murder of John Lennon. Was Mark Chapman a cold-blooded killer or a seriously deranged young man? We will backtrack through the lives of both men to set the scene through interviews and footage.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Missing Skelton Brothers
programme.desc: Three young brothers are reported missing the day after Thanksgiving. In a shocking twist, their daddy claims he gave them to an underground group -- but investigators say his story doesn’t add up.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Who Killed JonBenet Ramsey
programme.desc: Investigating a wide range of suspects and evidence in the killing of JonBenet, including the Ramsey's maid, and the man who portrayed Santa Claus at a holiday party, only days before JonBenet was found murdered.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Did Scott Peterson Murder Laci?
programme.desc: A tale of murder, adultery, courtroom drama, and ultimately the death penalty. The story of Scott and Laci Peterson as told by those who lived it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Headquarters
programme.desc: Hunters stumble upon a scene that includes a skull and small bones, bits of clothing, a woman's shoe, and a strand of hair. Police determine a woman was stabbed to death, and reconstruct an image of her face to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: One for the Road
programme.desc: After a married couple decided to escape the cold of winter with a vacation in Key West, the wife went missing and police searched the island without finding any evidence. Then two important pieces of video surfaced.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Oily in the Morning
programme.desc: Police recover a submerged car, but don't find the missing man they were looking for.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gold Rush
programme.desc: A man calls 911 saying his girlfriend shot herself, but the autopsy reveals that the gunshot wound was not self-inflicted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder on the Menu
programme.desc: When a Philadelphia restaurateur is murdered, the police sift through the usual suspects to find his killer. They soon uncover a sprawling web of deceit and debt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hot on the Trail
programme.desc: Investigators get involved after a serial arsonist begins starting blazes all over Washington DC.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Financial Downfall
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman is found dead after what seems like a tragic, accidental fall over a cliff. After a closer look at photographs from the scene, police get a new, more sinister theory about the young woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Daughter's Journey
programme.desc: A woman still haunted by her mother's disappearance 20 years before, decides to investigate herself. She finds her mother's old diary and discovers a grisly family secret that could explain just what happened to her mother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Just Desserts
programme.desc: A Florida couple is found dead just days before their planned move out of state. A known criminal's driver's license found at the crime scene seems too good to be true.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday's Wake
programme.desc: When a little girl got sick and died, investigators were stumped. Scientists would travel half-way around the world before finding the answer in two unlikely places.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Medicine
programme.desc: A woman becomes critically ill, leaving her unable to walk. As her symptoms worsen, she gets a bone marrow test. The results reveal arsenic. Investigators now have to determine if she was poisoned by water contamination, or something far more sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stick 'em Up
programme.desc: When a bank president is found floating in a nearby lake, taped to a chair, forensic experts start piecing together the tape and discover a missing piece. It's this piece, and tips pouring in from residents, that will lead to a capture.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wired for Disaster
programme.desc: A 29-year-old woman is killed instantly when a bomb explodes in her home. The bomber not only had knowledge and skill, but also a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wood-Be Killer
programme.desc: A murderer thought he could cover his tracks by setting fire to the crime scene, but in doing so, he provided the forensic evidence needed to convict him; a new forensic tool used to examine the kindling proved to be his undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fishing for the Truth
programme.desc: A rescued deckhand tells the story of how he tried desperately to free his captain when his foot got caught as their small boat was sinking in a storm. He's quickly hailed a hero. But when the captain's body is found, a different story is told.

programme.title: Forensic Files: For Love or Money
programme.desc: A wealthy man goes missing, and leaves behind instructions in his will regarding what should be done if he died of violent circumstances, leading to believe he was aware his life was in danger.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Strange Case of the Killer Nanny
programme.desc: When an eight-month-old baby is fatally injured while in the care of his nanny Louise Woodward, was is abuse or an accident?

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Casey Anthony Story
programme.desc: Two year-old Florida toddler Caylee Anthony vanished in 2008. Her mother Casey Anthony tells investigators that Caylee has been kidnapped by a nanny that no one in the family has seen before.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: James Jordan: Vanished
programme.desc: When in 1993, James Raymond Jordan Sr. goes missing and his luxury car is found stripped and abandoned in North Carolina, clues point to a tragic crime.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The O.J. Simpson Case: Other Killer Theories
programme.desc: New theories emerge in the O.J. Simpson case, including a serial killer's confession and a possible hit man who claims responsibility for the murders.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Legend of Jesse James
programme.desc: Josh journeys across the American Midwest in search of the legendary golden loot of Jesse James. Along the way, Josh debunks Jesse James myths, rappels off a cliff on Wichita Mt. and follows treasure hunters into Buzzards Roost.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Columbus: Legend or Liar?
programme.desc: Josh travels worldwide to uncover the myths behind Christopher Columbus.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Incan King's Mummy
programme.desc: Josh Gates ventures into the mysterious cloud forests of Ecuador's remote central highlands in search of the all-powerful mummy of the last Inca king, Atahualpa.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Lost Tomb of Attila the Hun
programme.desc: Josh travels to Hungary to join three separate archeological teams looking for the lost tomb of Attila the Hun. Legends and ancient texts lead the search from the bottom of the Danube to the mountain forests just outside of Budapest.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Africa's Gold Hoard
programme.desc: Josh searches for the Kruger Millions in the harsh wild of South Africa.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Origins of Stonehenge
programme.desc: Josh travels to his ancestral home of Great Britain to explore the origins of Stonehenge. From high in the air to deep under the sea, he finds an unexpected network of monuments that could have inspired one of history's most mystical locations.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for the Yeti: Return of the Yeti
programme.desc: Beginning in Kathmandu, Josh Gates heads high into the Himalayas of Nepal to obtain scientific evidence of the legendary Yeti. This time his mission is personal, and it will take him into uncharted territory.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for the Yeti: The Monster and the Mountain
programme.desc: Josh ascends higher into the Himalayas to explore caves, examine ancient artifacts, and investigate the mystical ties the legendary creature holds with the Nepalese people.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for the Yeti: Out of Thin Air
programme.desc: The hunt for the Yeti continues as Josh's quest takes him from the frozen slopes of Mount Everest to the isolated forests of Bhutan, where Josh uses bait to force a more personal encounter with the creature.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunt for the Yeti: Unmasking the Myth
programme.desc: Josh rafts into the remotest corners of Bhutan to capture some of his best evidence yet of the reclusive creature. Then he returns to the US where all of his samples are analyzed to find out if the Yeti is real.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: City of Gold
programme.desc: Josh treks the stone-paved Inca Trail, ascending 20,000 feet through the Andes and into the Peruvian Amazon in search of the undiscovered City of Gold. His road to riches takes a detour to the legendary ruins of Machu Picchu.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Secrets of the Nazca
programme.desc: Josh flies to Peru to investigate the giant geoglyphs drawn into earth by ancient Nazca tribes. By studying newly found lines and joining a Nazca psychedelic ritual, Josh uncovers the true meaning behind the mysterious tracings.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: No Second Chances
programme.desc: The Monkeys put the pedal to the metal in their final attempt to finish the '72 Buick Riviera super-build in time for SEMA. The team's integrity is on the line and $300,000 has been invested so failure is not an option.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: A Very Brady Edition
programme.desc: Barry Williams (a.k.a. Greg Brady) hires Richard and the Monkeys to build a Brady Bunch station wagon with Monkey style.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: A Far-Out Brady Bunch Build
programme.desc: The Monkeys continue work on Barry Williams' 1969 Plymouth Satellite. As the deadline nears, Richard and his crew must defeat the curse of the tiki idol if they want to meet Barry's expectations before the car's debut on HGTV.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Bullitt in the Chamber
programme.desc: Chad McQueen asks Richard and the Monkeys to turn a 1968 Flashback Mustang into the iconic muscle car for a recreation of Hollywood's most famous movie car chases.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Clip Shows

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Chop Shop Truck
programme.desc: Richard Rawlings makes Brian Bass an offer he can't refuse to turn his antique Ford into the ultimate Gas Monkey shop truck. And Richard is seeing green over a 1970 Cuda, but transit trouble has the rest of the Monkeys seeing red.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Monsters and Monkeys

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: The Pickup Artist
programme.desc: Richard and Aaron set an ambitious deadline of just six weeks to turn an old '49 Chevy pickup into a show-quality truck in time to debut at the big Lone Star Throwdown.

programme.title: Closing Bell

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Cave Dwelling Sponge/ The Clam Whisperer
programme.desc: When a prehistoric Sponge is unfrozen, he causes chaos all over town, and only SpongeBob can communicate with him. A flock of clams descend on Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Appointment TV/ Karen's Virus
programme.desc: The long-lost episode of Mermaid Man is finally showing on TV, but SpongeBob may not make it home in time to watch. Karen gets a computer virus, and it's up to SpongeBob to get it out of her.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Truth or Square

programme.title: The Casagrandes: A Very Casagrandes Christmas

programme.title: The Loud House: Season's Cheatings/ A Flipmas Carol

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Soap Opera Party

programme.desc: An unexpected death rocks the Plunkett household.

programme.title: Movie: Clueless

programme.title: Full House: Arrest Ye Merry Gentlemen
programme.desc: Michelle and Jesse are almost arrested on Christmas Eve while trying to exchange a gift.

programme.title: Full House: Baby Love

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pressure/ Smoking Peanut
programme.desc: Spongebob and Sandy compete in extreme underwater sports; Spongebob and Pat visit the zoo.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines: Blaze Christmas
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are helping Santa and his elves load his magic bag full of presents when Crusher, who wants to open his present early, knocks it over, sending all the presents flying away! Now they have to rescue and deliver the presents before morning.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a White Wolf/ Pups Save a Wrong Way Explorer
programme.desc: After a sudden snow storm, Everest cares for a white wolf cub as they work together to help the PAW Patrol find them. Famous wrong-way explorer, Travelling Travis, accidentally takes Chickaletta to the North Pole where they run into... crocodiles.

programme.title: Peppa Pig: Christmas at the Hospital/ Buried Treasure/ Bat and Ball
programme.desc: Peppa falls and hurts her arm on Christmas day. Peppa finds a box of pirate treasure. The children learn how to play bat and ball. Peppa and her friends play in the snow. Peppa goes for a daytrip to the snowy beach.

programme.title: Baby Shark's Big Show!: All I Want for Fishmas
programme.desc: With Fishmas just around the corner, the season's hottest toy - Burpin' Bubbz - is at the top of Baby's and William's wish lists. When Santa Jaws goes missing, it's up to them to save Fishmas if they're ever going to get their fins on that toy.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save Christmas

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a Bah Humdinger!

programme.desc: Cap'n Turbot's boat gets frozen in the Arctic Ice.The pups use the Sea Patroller to help guide a lost narwhal back home.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pet or Pests/ Komputer Overload
programme.desc: SpongeBob adopts a stray worm, which soon gives birth to a litter of baby worms.

programme.desc: Squidward wants SpongeBob and Sandy to teach him karate after being robbed of his groceries. SpongeBob goes to great lengths to force out a pesky sea urchin from the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Just One Bite/ The Bully

programme.desc: When Sandy tells the residents of Bikini Bottom about Christmas, SpongeBob wants to bring the holiday to the town. His enthusiasm is infectious, but everyone blames SpongeBob when Santa is a no show on Christmas morning.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Keep Bikini Bottom Beautiful/ A Pal for Gary

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SB-129/ Karate Choppers
programme.desc: Squidward ends up in a freezer; Bob and Sandy's incessant karate sparring wreaks havoc.

programme.title: Mayday: Split Decision

programme.title: Mayday: Munich Air Disaster
programme.desc: Members of the famed Manchester United football team are headed home from Yugoslavia. After a refuelling stop in Munich, the plane attempts to take off, but crashes into a nearby house and fuel shed, killing 23 people including seven players.

programme.title: Mayday: Nowhere to Land
programme.desc: Touching down on a narrow grass levee, the pilots of TACA Flight 110 manage a most remarkable landing. Investigators then try determining why the engines of a brand-new Boeing 737 failed in mid-flight.

programme.title: Mayday: Caution to the Wind
programme.desc: While taking off in a tropical storm, Singapore Airlines Flight 006 crashes at Taipei's Chang Kai-shek Airport. Investigators wonder if fierce winds blew the aircraft off course, until they find tire marks on a runway under construction.

programme.title: Mayday: Blind Landing
programme.desc: Investigators face a major challenge when looters make off with key evidence from the crash of TANS Peru Flight 204. It takes all their ingenuity to reconstruct the final moments of the flight to find out why the 737 crashed in the jungle.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: Not Your Regular Fender Bender
programme.desc: A runaway van smashes through a wall and into the path of a full-speed truck. The crew hurries to save a load of pharmaceuticals before it freezes.

programme.title: Fat Guys in the Woods: Swamp MacGyvers
programme.desc: Creek teaches three self-proclaimed DIY’ers the skills to survive a natural disaster on Cutoff Island in Florida. They create a 'tampon fire cigar' and build a 'swamp cot' from duct-tape. Creek shocks everyone when he adds a new challenge to solo day.

programme.title: Mayday: Blind Landing

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: A man tries to get his car off the auction block; Marlene has a showdown with angry citizens.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: When a man flies into a rage after getting a ticket, Marilyn takes it to heart. Steve loses his mojo.

programme.title: Parking Wars

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: Marlene's experience gives her the upper hand when she's insulted by a group of young men. A fast-food manager struggles to retrieve his impounded car.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: Mike comes across a parking fiasco at a Philly gala event and sparks begin to fly. Two boys try to free their car from an impound lot.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Friend of the Family/ Remains of Murder
programme.desc: Police get a hand from a killer's ex-girlfriend; a set of bones helps find the killer of a teenaged boy.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: The Accidental Killer/ Little Sister Lost
programme.desc: A man who claimed his wife fell into a creek and died draws police suspicion when his third wife supposedly suffers the same fate, leading to his eventual arrest and conviction for murder; a search volunteer is linked to a teen's murder.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: The Monster/ A Cousin's Promise
programme.desc: An Arkansas man confesses to two murders; DNA on a scarf helps solve a 21-year-old case.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Officer Down
programme.desc: The longest running cold case of a law enforcement officer in the United States was the murder of Sheriff's Lt. Joe Clark, who was shot execution style in his own home. It took 33 years to discover the truth.

programme.title: The First 48 Presents Critical Minutes: The Chase
programme.desc: In Tulsa, investigators undertake an undercover operation to nab the suspect. In Dallas, detectives exploit a love triangle to bring a suspect in.

programme.title: The First 48 Presents Critical Minutes: Caught on Camera I
programme.desc: Three of The First 48's most memorable cases featuring surveillance video are highlighted, including a robbery in Cleveland, an encounter in a Dallas elevator and a misleading story in Memphis.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: The guys take time to smell the roses, then pair up to double dip at the mall. Tonight's loser battles an undead enemy to save his family.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: The guys head to the Top of the Rock for some awkward interactions, and tonight's big loser suits up or down for a run across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q enlist shoppers to help them avoid a rogue security guard, and tonight's big loser faces the wrath of a crowd of rockers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q take a spin in a motorized chair hoping the kindness of strangers will keep them on track. Tonight's big loser walks away bruised and battered when he's forced to clear some tables in an unusual way.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: The guys skirt the law while posing as receptionists, then go fishing at an unlikely locale. And the heat is on tonight's big losers as they try to give one unlucky customer the deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q play matchmakers at the food court, then switch fields to pose as architects, sharing some perplexing new building technology. Plus, tonight's big loser makes a connection while networking, and won't let go.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sucks for You
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr bus their way through Katz’s Deli, then express some unpopular opinions at the park. Plus, tonight’s big loser must talk his way through some real highs and lows, in a punishment that truly sucks.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Toll Booth Corrector
programme.desc: The guys pose as suspicious nutritionists trying to recruit clients, before quitting their jobs for strange reasons. Afterwards, the gang goes head-to-head in a wild debate judged by a stranger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Paternity Test
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as concierges in a hotel lobby, and then commit insurance fraud with the help of some confused strangers. Afterwards, tonight's loser suffers a personal punishment that's anything but child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Tacos with Guy Episode
programme.desc: Take a seat at the table as the guys dish out what they've been up to this week at home. Get a glimpse of how the guys really hang out and, after some grub, they'll battle it out over who will be hosting next week's meal.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Steak and Potatoes Episode
programme.desc: Join the guys as they do what they do best: talk with their mouths full. The boys will surely be eating a well-balanced meal and dishing out what they've been up to at home.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Pizza Episode
programme.desc: You're cordially invited to a one-of-a-kind dinner party at Joe, Q, Murr, and Sal's homes from the comfort of your own.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The PB&J Episode
programme.desc: The guys dine and discuss their week. Find out who can make the best meal and how long Q's beard has become.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Ash Clown
programme.desc: The guys give customers an eye opening experience at a glasses store, and convince customers to pass illicit, and ridiculous, messages while shopping for groceres.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Captain Fatbelly
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q lend an unhelpful hand while working at a high-tech store, then play detectives at the mall in search of perps on the loose. Tonight's loser gets the shakes while soaring high above the city.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Tooth and Consequences
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q spread the love as attendants in a bridal dress shop much to the dismay of the brides-to-be, and break a sacred guy-code in the process. Plus, they attempt to sway frightened focus groups with fragrance campaigns that stink.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Wrong Playwright
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q hit the supermarket to mess with shoppers in an epic game of hide-and-sneak. Then, the guys draw straws at a BBQ joint, and tonight's loser gets a bad case of stage fright while giving the performance of his life.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Butt of the Joker
programme.desc: The guys pair up in focus group presentations, and tonight's loser tries to cure the public of a nasty habit, but gets people smoking mad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Deal With the Devils
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr invade a silent library to see who can make the most noise without getting into trouble. Plus, they search for their missing wives at the mall, and tonight's two losers get iced out by the New Jersey Devils.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Just Made History
programme.desc: In the season premiere, Michael poses as a hipster at a farmers' market and makes an endless supply of juice. Then, things become blurry at the eye doctor, and later, shape-shifting aliens send Michael's co-worker into a frenzy.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Dangerously Drinkable
programme.desc: Michael astounds dental patients with molar radio transmissions, and while appraising art, he brings an extinct species back to life. Plus, an unusual brew stirs a ghostly hallucination that will make jaws drop.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Japanese Waterless Folding Toilet
programme.desc: Michael stretches headphone cords and reality with a mystical putty, stuns a co-worker with new bathroom technology, and in the big finale, a Porta Potty becomes a Portal Potty, leaving a construction worker amazed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Truth Hurts
programme.desc: The guys search for imaginary places with a little help from strangers, pick their own poison in the park, and there's a surprise behind every door in the horrifying hunt for a house sitter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Psychotic Not-line
programme.desc: The guys endure a shakedown in a discount store, put their fate in the hands of the 'Wheel of Doom' and try to hack it as Hibachi chefs.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Got the Bug Out
programme.desc: How did Michael find the customer with the bug in his phone? And how many times does he try the average trick?

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Out of Bounce
programme.desc: What happens when someone isn't in front of the right hidden camera? Does Michael ever get cash register training?

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Don't Freeze Me
programme.desc: Find out why Michael loves to shoot in coffee shops and what happens when a live animal tries to make a break for it in the middle of a trick.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Rules for Dating My Teenage Daughter
programme.desc: When Julie announces she's going back to work, Todd must transform into Mr. Mom and take over the household duties. Meanwhile, Savannah feels like she's ready to start dating and pleads her case to go out with a 19-year-old American Idol.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Misadventures in Babysitting
programme.desc: Todd and Julie head out of town, and leave Chase and Savannah at home to watch Grayson overnight for the first time. They hope they will follow the rules, but Chase and Savannah have plans of their own.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Father's Day
programme.desc: It's Father's Day and the kids try and plan a day for dad, but their bright idea of going to an amusement park backfires, as Todd's competitive side turns their planned day of fun into an all-out competition.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Confessions of a Beauty Queen
programme.desc: With Savannah and Chase leaving the nest in the next few years, Todd and Julie decide it's time to downsize.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Chase Turns 18
programme.desc: After 18 years of counting down the days, Chase is finally 18! When he tells Todd that he will no longer follow the house rules such as a curfew, Todd decides it’s time to give his son a dose of reality and show him what it’s really like to be an adult.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Anger Management
programme.desc: Todd blames his family for his stress when his doctor tells him that he has high blood pressure. Savannah gives Todd more bad news. Nothing works until Todd finds his own way to relieve his stress, leaving the kids running for cover.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: California Chrisleys
programme.desc: The Chrisleys venture to LA for their regular Beverly Hills haircuts, and for what Todd hopes will be a relaxing family vacation. His plans and sanity are threatened by new levels of Chrisley family craziness when Savannah does something drastic.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Workin' for a Livin'
programme.desc: After Todd unknowingly foots the bill for an extravagant lunch, he wants Chase and Savannah to learn that money doesn't grow on trees. Forced to get summer jobs, the kids struggle to face the reality of a hard day's work for the first time.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Great Outdoors
programme.desc: Todd and Chase are forced to experience the great outdoors when Grayson insists on going camping. While the guys 'rough it' in a luxury RV and terrify Grayson with stories of a haunted lake, Savannah and Julie must go back to driving school.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Marriage Redux
programme.desc: Todd and Julie want to avoid a marriage rut when the kids go to college, so they look for new ways to reconnect and put the spark back in their relationship.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Houseguest From Hell
programme.desc: Todd's home life is turned upside down when Julie’s pregnant and very demanding friend comes over to stay a few days. Also, Todd tries to bridge the gap between himself and his oldest daughter Lindsie.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Still Chrisley After All These Years
programme.desc: Julie and Todd decide to celebrate their wedding anniversary by throwing a charity event to raise money for breast cancer. When someone mixes up the dates, however, it’s a mad scramble to try to pull off the biggest party of the year.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Savannah's Big ID-EA
programme.desc: When an influential Southern magazine asks The Chrisleys for an interview about all things fashion, Todd insists on trying to control the situation by writing a script for his family to memorize.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Life's a Pitch
programme.desc: Todd thinks that he's saving the day when he steps in to coach Grayson's baseball team, but when he discovers he's in way over his head, he must figure out a way to regain the respect (and control) of these overzealous 9 year olds.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Getting Testy
programme.desc: When Savannah makes a proposal to Todd, one that would allow her go to college a year early, he wages an all-out family competition to keep her at home as long as possible, and Chase pays the price by having Todd as his ACT coach.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Dollars and Sense
programme.desc: Savannah has a rose coloured view of what her spending habits will look like when she goes off to college.

programme.title: Celebrity Game Face: Sticky Faces and Booty Races

programme.title: Celebrity Game Face: Sweatsuit Charades and Donuts Holes

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Cheers to That!

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Clothes Quarters

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Catch Me If You Cannes

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Fan Friction
programme.desc: Khloe fears that Cleveland fans may turn on her family. Kim gets fed up with her lack of willpower and makes a drastic lifestyle.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Close to Home

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Dog Tired
programme.desc: Khloé and Kendall consider getting guns for protection, Kris imposes strict guidelines for her mom to follow in her new condo, and later Kim can't handle her new rambunctious puppy.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: Officers Bronson and Towne get more than they bargained for with a speeding snowmobiler. The K-9 unit performs winter training. Officer MacFadzen patrols an ice drag racing event. Then, Officer Cyrs heads into the woods to investigate a hit and run.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: Conservation Officers statewide join forces with volunteers and the National Guard to launch an intensive search for a missing hiker. In Littleton, Officer McKee gets news of a bear who has infiltrated a home in search of food.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Treacherous Trails
programme.desc: During a busy winter weekend, Lt. Boudreau encounters kite skiers, an illegal fire sled and a vandalized bob-house. Officer Canfield searches for a deer with an arrow in its head. Then, Officers Demler and Towne head our on a mountain rescue.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Stubborn as a Moose
programme.desc: Sgt. Lopashanski attempts every trick in the book to wrangle a stubborn moose off of a busy roadway. Officer Canfield plays a game of cat and mouse with a suspected illegal deer hunter, and Officer McKee and Demler investigate an illegal turkey kill.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Most Memorable Rescues
programme.desc: The officers revisit their most memorable rescues. Sgt. Lucas reflects on an intense rescue mission on Mt. Madison. MacFadzen recounts the rescue of a barred owl trapped in a fence. And Bronson recalls a multi-day search for a missing hiker.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Cat and Mouse
programme.desc: A team of officers stakeout hunting sites across New Hampshire after reports of illegal activity. Officer Lopashanski investigates the mysterious discovery of untagged, unregistered deer parts hanging in front of a burnt-out building.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Sneak Peek
programme.desc: Texas game wardens protect the natural resources of their vast state while fighting crime.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Mountaintop Mystery
programme.desc: On Mt. Monadnock, a severed finger is found, sending a team and K-9 Wyatt to search for other possible body parts. A family of repeat offenders are found riding their ATVs without proper protective gear, and a man admits to an illegal bear kill.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Dawn Patrol
programme.desc: Pre-dawn on opening day of rifle season, Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett pursue a night hunter. While up north, Officers Canfield and St. Pierre battle the snow to work a deer decoy. And in the city, Officer Frye wrestles an aggressive wild turkey.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Cat and Mouse
programme.desc: A team of officers stakeout hunting sites across New Hampshire after reports of illegal activity. Officer Lopashanski investigates the mysterious discovery of untagged, unregistered deer parts hanging in front of a burnt-out building.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Most Memorable Rescues
programme.desc: The officers revisit their most memorable rescues. Sgt. Lucas reflects on an intense rescue mission on Mt. Madison. MacFadzen recounts the rescue of a barred owl trapped in a fence. And Bronson recalls a multi-day search for a missing hiker.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Deer Deception
programme.desc: It's deer season, the most popular big game hunting season in the state.

programme.title: North Woods Law: The Rescuers
programme.desc: The wardens race against the clock to evacuate an injured hiker on the Appalachian Trail. A fishing license check leads Warden Dan Christianson to a suspicious stash. Things run afoul as Warden Kris MacCabe discovers great blue herons acting strangely.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Summer Heats Up
programme.desc: Summer has arrived and people are filling up the woods and causing trouble. MacCabe finds a campsite where the occupants seem to have vanished, and the wardens search for a pot grow op after a drug deal went wrong.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Dirty Habits
programme.desc: Parker investigates a rotting bear carcass that was dumped on the side of the road, leading him on a hunt across Maine to find a potential poacher. Blanchard catches a couple behaving badly on a wildlife refuge. Robertson rescues some ducklings.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Glasshouse Treehouse
programme.desc: Pete treks to New York's Catskill Mountains to build an NTS first - a glasshouse in the sky. Piecing materials together like a puzzle, Pete uses his clients' collection of 50 vintage windows to construct an elegant treehouse encased by walls of glass.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Apres Skihouse Treehouse
programme.desc: Pete designs a ski chalet treehouse that glistens as bright as the freshest powder atop a black diamond run. The 20-ft high winter retreat comes complete with a secret bedroom and a double-sided fireplace to keep guests warm both inside and out.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Appalachian Christmas Treehouse
programme.desc: Pete and his merry men trek to the Blue Ridge Mountains to build a treehouse for one of their own, carpenter Mike Reynolds. Sitting 16 feet high, it will be the perfect rustic guesthouse to host the raucous Appalachian Breaking Up Christmas tradition.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Treetop Medieval Fortress
programme.desc: Pete builds a citadel fortress for a Texan couple who loves all things medieval. A 25 ft-high tower will hold a round table and thrones, as well as a glass floor loft. A metalsmith joins the build to craft medieval touches, like a dragon door handle.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Super Spy Treehouse
programme.desc: Pete heads to Alabama's Appalachia to build a super spy treehouse. There, he pulls out all the stops to make the client's espionage-themed dreams come true. We're talking gadgets, hidden passageways, secret rooms and more.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Antonio Brown's Steel City Skybox
programme.desc: Pete makes a treehouse touchdown in Pittsburgh for Antonio Brown, wide receiver for the Steelers. The game plan is to build a luxury skybox with a two-storey window wall that overlooks a custom basketball court and football field.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: The Alaskan Treetop Sauna
programme.desc: Pete creates an arboreal abode for an adventurous Alaskan couple that offers all the warm fuzzies they get from the outdoors without having to brave the bitter mountain cold.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Hot Tub Rumpus Room
programme.desc: Pete's fun-loving friend, and forklift supplier, is the lucky recipient of a treehouse built strictly for good times. The team builds a dream of a treehouse complete with a wine bar, a loft and their first ever hot tub in the woods of Western Washington.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Flood, Sweat, and Tears: Part Two

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Fire and Gold
programme.desc: In order to rescue a homestead at risk of igniting the next big wildfire, the Raneys must overhaul Kevin Tubbs' faulty electrical system and build the first hydro-electric wheel on the Little Susitna River to make the homestead safe for his children.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: The Search Begins
programme.desc: An elite team of specialists use an advanced data algorithm to pinpoint when and where to encounter Bigfoot. Armed with the latest technology, they are in a race against time as they search for the elusive beast in the unforgiving Oregon wilderness.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: Did You Hear That?
programme.desc: With one team member down, Russell and Mireya head back into the forest to hunt down their leads. Their intense investigation uncovers their first pieces of possible Bigfoot evidence.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: The Nest
programme.desc: Russell stumbles upon a structure he believes is a Bigfoot nest. Ronny and Mireya race to the nest to collect DNA samples that could break open their investigation.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: Red Eyes at Night
programme.desc: Mireya and Ronny make a powerful discovery in the area surrounding the nest. When Russell suddenly falls ill, Bryce tests the theory that Bigfoot can render humans sick by emoting infrasound and is doing this to keep the team out of its territory.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: Human Bait
programme.desc: The team plants tiny trackers around the clearing hoping they will cling to Bigfoot's fur. Mireya and Ronny return to where they heard whistles and saw glowing eyes. This time they have a plan: Mireya agrees to be bait in order to lure out Bigfoot.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: Bigfoot Moon Rising
programme.desc: After Russell records thermal imagery he's convinced is Bigfoot, Bryce hurries to have the footage analyzed by experts. The evidence is staggering. Mireya and Ronny have a terrifying experience when they realize they're not along in the forest.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: It Knows We're Here
programme.desc: Mireya's darkest nightmare comes true. Russell investigates a possible Bigfoot underwater passageway. Bryce secures an airship to survey the final square miles for Bigfoot's heat signature.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot: The Final Hours
programme.desc: The team believes they've finally narrowed down where Bigfoot has been hiding throughout their expedition. A high-tech drone is brought in to investigate, and what takes place next is truly astonishing.

programme.title: Below Deck: Shame Cocoon

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Sharpe Shooters
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars check out the forefather of modern machine guns, a Gatling gun. Corey and the Old Man try to hail down a piece of automotive history.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Bear-ly There
programme.desc: The team sets their sights on an 1870 Volcanic pistol. A World War II gas mask is found. An early 1900s life-sized Steiff bear prowls into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Trigger Happy
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars get fired up when a rare three-trigger Stevens shotgun barrels into the shop. Corey and Rick are presented with a movie camera used by the U. S. military during World War II.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: What the Truck
programme.desc: The gang is presented with a 1960s Mercedes Unimog. A guy marches in with a sign that hung on the Berlin Wall.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Corey, I Am Your Father
programme.desc: A guy brings in a Smith carbine from the Civil War; JFK memorabilia shows up.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Whodunit?
programme.desc: Corey and Chumlee check out a pair of baby Air Jordans signed by Michael Jordan. Then, a medallion once owned by Liberace comes into the shop. Later, Rick uses surveillance video to check how much the staff plays while the boss is away.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: McKinley Family Jewels
programme.desc: Rick falls in love with a tiara that belonged to the wife of President McKinley. A Felix the Cat sparkler toy pounces into the shop. Everyone loses their patience when Rick receives a secret package.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Fiesta Loco
programme.desc: A Monet landscape gets brought into the shop, as well as an old firefighter station. Next, Rick gets a history lesson on Cinco de Mayo.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Tickets to Ride
programme.desc: A pair of rare tickets to The Beatles film 'A Hard Day's Night' comes into the shop. Then, an 1850 Indian Peace Medal given by President Fillmore arrives. Later, Rick gets all hot and bothered when control over the thermostat becomes an all-out war.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: McQueen Dreams
programme.desc: A letter from World War 1 fighter pilot Eddie Rickenbacker arrives at the shop and Corey checks out a military swagger stick from 1865. Rick gets excited about some movie posters featuring Steve McQueen.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Motorcycle Mayhem

programme.title: Pawn Stars: One Man's Junk
programme.desc: A baseball believed to have been signed by the 1959 World Series Champion Dodgers comes in to the shop. Then, Rick checks out a rare movie camera from the 1930s. Also, Old Man seeks revenge when Rick bans junk food in the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn Creature
programme.desc: Catch the Pawn Stars as they come face-to-face with a life-size Creature from the Black Lagoon. Then, Rick gets the inside scoop with a handwritten love letter from Judy Garland to Frank Sinatra. Also, Chum and Corey try to scare Rick at the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pink Trains and Open Flames

programme.title: Pawn Stars: He Shoots, He Pawns

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: The Lost Reindeer

programme.title: NCIS: Silent Night

programme.title: NCIS: Newborn King

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa the Veterinarian

programme.title: Tiny House Nation: 300 Sq. Ft. His n' Hers House

programme.title: Tiny House Nation
programme.desc: Individuals and families choose the Tiny House lifestyle by downsizing to the extreme.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Battle of Britain

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Yukon Vet: Fly Like an Eagle
programme.desc: Dr. Oakley makes her way around the Yukon for some necessary house calls. Working as a vet can be tough, but working as a vet in the Yukon can be outright brutal.

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Yukon Vet: Reindeer Pains
programme.desc: This week Dr. Oakley is tasked with performing a risky surgery on a reindeer that may not make it through the winter.

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Yukon Vet: One Angry Muskox
programme.desc: Being a vet in the Yukon is never an easy job. But after diagnosing terminally ill patients and getting chased by a muskox, this week is getting downright tough for Dr. Michelle Oakley.

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Yukon Vet: Caribou Down
programme.desc: It's mating season in the Yukon which means Dr. Oakley is busier than ever.

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Yukon Vet: Oakley Get Your Blow Gun

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Back to the Suture
programme.desc: Follow veterinarian Dr. Jan Pol as he treats animals at his clinic in rural Michigan.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: My Fair Piggy
programme.desc: The Isabella County Fair is just around the corner, which means Dr. Pol, Dr. Emily and Dr. Brenda are busy treating fair animals, making sure they are in tiptop shape for competition.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Piggin' Out
programme.desc: Things get a little saucy after Dr. Pol is asked to be a judge at the Hearty Harvest Chili Cook Off.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: The Amazing Dr. Brenda
programme.desc: After a long week of treating sick bunnies, horses and dogs, Dr. Brenda and the ladies head out for a night of fun.

programme.title: How It's Made: Stuffed Olives/ Astrolabes/ Western Saddles
programme.desc: How they make stuffed olives, astrolabes and western saddles.

programme.title: How It's Made: Peaked Caps, Custom Water Heaters, Electric Boats, and Fencing Foils
programme.desc: Find out how peaked caps, water heaters, electric boats, and fencing foils are made.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alaska's Fort Apocalypse
programme.desc: In Alaska, the ruins of a massive compound point to eerie evidence of an apocalyptic mystery. New discoveries reveal why this strange marvel was built in the snowy wilds of the Last Frontier and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Towers of Blood
programme.desc: Abandoned towers in southern Greece are the ruins of a fearsome warrior civilization descended from the Spartans, and new discoveries reveal the role these towers played during generations of violent blood feuds among the clans that lived here.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alien Hell Portal
programme.desc: A strange complex of tunnels on the grounds of a bizarre mansion was under lock-and-key for a century, and since its rediscovery, some believe its mysterious place is a gate to hell. New discoveries reveal its secret purpose and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of Mafia Island
programme.desc: A Mediterranean island paradise is not all that it seems; its complex of abandoned buildings were once prisons for the world's most dangerous Mafiosi; experts investigate new evidence to reveal who was imprisoned here and the secrets they left behind.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secrets of Seahenge
programme.desc: A prehistoric megastructure emerges from the sands of an English shore that could reveal lost mysteries to the Bronze Age; using pioneering technology and 3-D imaging analysis, experts investigate and uncover dark, ancient rituals once performed here.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Treasures of the Warrior King
programme.desc: The treasure trove of Sutton Hoo is one of the great discoveries from medieval Europe, and its mysteries conceal the secrets of a lost world; cutting-edge archaeology and an international expedition reveal the truth behind the riches of a warrior king.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Lost Relic of the Ice Age
programme.desc: An Ice Age relic found in a mysterious cave is evidence of prehistoric humans' connection to the supernatural.

programme.title: Unearthed: Secrets of Seahenge
programme.desc: A prehistoric megastructure emerges from the sands of an English shore that could reveal lost mysteries to the Bronze Age; using pioneering technology and 3-D imaging analysis, experts investigate and uncover dark, ancient rituals once performed here.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Treasures of the Warrior King
programme.desc: The treasure trove of Sutton Hoo is one of the great discoveries from medieval Europe, and its mysteries conceal the secrets of a lost world; cutting-edge archaeology and an international expedition reveal the truth behind the riches of a warrior king.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Lost Relic of the Ice Age

programme.title: Phantom Signals: Alien Evidence: The Holy Grail
programme.desc: When a powerful radio beam originating from deep space is detected by experts on earth, some suspect its hard evidence of extraterrestrial life; new investigations into this shocking signal might reveal the truth.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: The Ghost on the Radio
programme.desc: When someone picks up a radio distress call from a seven-year-old boy lost alone in the desert, authorities embark on a search-and-rescue mission to find him; as the hunt continues, the case becomes more and more mysterious.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: Soviet Doomsday Warning
programme.desc: A Russian radio station has broadcast a signal nonstop since the Cold War, and no one knows why; experts use hi-tech methods to investigate what it is, and what might happen if it ever stops.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: To Catch a UFO
programme.desc: An intercept pilot chases a UFO only to vanish forever, then, a mysterious hum plagues 2% of the planet.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: Curse of the Lost Cosmonaut
programme.desc: When two experts build their own radio-listening station to intercept the secret communications of American and Soviet astronauts, they capture traces of a haunting voice that may be a lost Russian cosmonaut. New, declassified evidence reveals the truth.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Alien Egg
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a strange, human-sized egg floating in Arctic waters, some experts wonder if it's evidence of alien life; using cutting-edge technology, investigators try to reveal the true origins of this unexplained discovery.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Nuclear Demon Mummy
programme.desc: When a strange, dried-out creature washes ashore downriver from a nuclear power plant, some experts suspect it's the mummified corpse of a mutant; using the latest science and tech, this incredible theory is put to the test.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien Armageddon Conspiracy
programme.desc: A terrifying tower of fire is caught on camera, causing eyewitnesses to fear an alien invasion. Using cutting-edge science, experts investigate the threat causing this nightmarish phenomenon, and if a cover-up is hiding the truth.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien in the Abyss
programme.desc: When footage of a strange deep-sea vessel is uncovered, experts wonder if its evidence of an autonomous alien craft sent to explore earth, and using cutting-edge tech, investigators follow the clues to an unexpected explanation.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Underwater Godzilla
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a massive, never-before-seen sea creature in mysterious waters near Japan, some experts wonder if it's an undiscovered underwater monster; using cutting-edge tech, investigators hunt for this beast of the deep.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Alien of the Amazon
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a strange, blob-like alien in the Amazon jungle, some experts suspect that the origins of this monster are stranger-than-fiction; using cutting-edge science, investigators try to explain this bizarre beast.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Church of the Death Eaters
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a swam of millions of strange creatures invading a church, some wonder if it's evidence of a grisly secret buried in the ground below. Using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate the threat this insect army poses.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Murder On Newberry St.
programme.desc: In 1969 race riots in York, PA, claim two lives - an African-American mother of two and a young, white police officer. Their deaths are largely forgotten until 30 years later, when their cold cases are reopened, revealing the city's dark past.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Connecticut Horror Story
programme.desc: One summer night in 2007 comes as a nightmare for the Petit family when woken up by two strangers in their quiet, peaceful home of Cheshire, Connecticut. Suddenly this family of four finds themselves held hostage and in a fight for their lives.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: My Father, The Serial Killer
programme.desc: Horror strikes a small Wisconsin town in 1980 after a young couple disappears and is later discovered in a field. Dubbed the Sweetheart Murders, it's almost 40 years before a woman comes forward saying her family holds the key to unlocking the case.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Once Bitten
programme.desc: Sherri Rasmussen and John Ruetten are enjoying newlywed life until one morning in 1986 when Sherri calls into work sick. That night John returns home, only to find her murdered. Years later, detectives discover her killer was too close for comfort.

programme.title: American Monster: Out of His Shell
programme.desc: A look at killers who are hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: Doomsday: The Missing Children: The Disappearance
programme.desc: In the fall of 2019, a boy and his stepsister go missing. Grandparents Larry and Kay Woodcock desperately try to find out what happened to them and why.

programme.title: Doomsday: The Missing Children: Into the Past
programme.desc: 7-year-old JJ Vallow and 17-year-old Tylee Ryan have been missing for months. Their mother Lori Vallow defies a court order to appear in Idaho with her children. And JJ's grandparents, Larry and Kay Woodcock, embark on a desperate search for answers.

programme.title: Doomsday: The Missing Children: End Times
programme.desc: Lori Vallow is extradited from Hawaii to Rexburg, Idaho to face charges of deserting her missing children, JJ and Tylee. Kay and Larry continue to search for answers and try to remain hopeful, but in the summer of 2020, the case takes a tragic turn.

programme.title: Doomsday: The Missing Children: The Disappearance
programme.desc: In the fall of 2019, a boy and his stepsister go missing. Grandparents Larry and Kay Woodcock desperately try to find out what happened to them and why.

programme.title: American Monster: Out of His Shell
programme.desc: A look at killers who are hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: American Monster: Double Cross
programme.desc: Four best friends, two married couples, multiple sordid secrets, one huge betrayal and a murder. With exclusive interviews and never-before-aired home movie footage, this is a story about how a love affair resulted in a crime of passion.

programme.title: American Monster: Off-Camera
programme.desc: An obsessive video blogger and mother of five shares every detail of her rollercoaster life with her husband and their children online. But one night, intruders tie her up and kidnap her husband and execute him. It seems someone has been keeping secrets.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Red Hot Temper
programme.desc: Some women have short fuses, and when their blood boils get out of their way. A couple's New Year's resolution ends in a murderous rampage; a pious parish housekeeper hides a sinful secret and a Christmas drink between neighbors has a deadly hangover.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Illicit and Lethal
programme.desc: Their affairs are hot... but their tempers are hotter.

programme.title: Deadly Women: For the Money Honey
programme.desc: For these women, one good man wasn't enough. A middle-aged woman used looks to prey on elderly gentleman; an army wife didn't want a soldier but a squad; and a serial wife cooks up meals to die for. These Deadly Women married for the money, honey.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Fatal Love
programme.desc: When familiarity breeds contempt, love can turn to hate.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Teen Terror
programme.desc: If a teen's emotional changes become overwhelming, sometimes the results can be deadly.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Loveless
programme.desc: There are many ways to leave your lover one of those ways is dead.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Murder for Me
programme.desc: Some women like others to do their dirty work. A drama queen brings her love triangle to a permanent end; an intimate betrayal turns friends into deadly foes; and a loose woman will do anything to protect her freedom.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Yes, Master.
programme.desc: When an aspiring kindergarten teacher in Dublin, Ireland goes missing, her family assumes depression over her mother's death drove her to suicide. They never suspected the real reason – involving a twisted BDSM master gone horribly wrong.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Cold Blue Blood
programme.desc: Dr. Dirk Greineder is one of the most respected men in the upper class community of Wellesley, Massachusetts… that is, until a secret X-rated addiction spirals out of control and results in a gruesome murder no one saw coming.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: She Loves Me Not
programme.desc: When Special Forces Major David Shannon is fatally shot in his family home, investigators wonder if his job made him a target. But a deeper inspection of his personal life reveals sordid secrets... possibly leading to his murder.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: SAS vs. Rommel
programme.desc: The SAS launches a daring raid behind enemy lines on a German airfield in the Sahara Desert. If they succeed in destroying Rommel's supply planes, their action could turn the tide of war and allow the British to drive the Germans out of North Africa.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Winston Churchill
programme.desc: May 28, 1940, while the Wehrmacht crushes the allied armies in France, British officials prepare to face Hitler.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in Europe
programme.desc: As 1945 began, Hitler's Third Reich was entering its death throes. In the west, Allied forces were within striking distance of the Rhine. In the east, a Red Army blitzkrieg brought Soviet forces to the River Oder just an hour's drive from Berlin.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Final Victory
programme.desc: The provoking thoughts behind some of the war's most tragic events are shared as the war in the Pacific nears its violent end.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Victory in the Pacific
programme.desc: By the beginning of 1945, Japan's situation was desperate. Its navy and naval air power had effectively ceased to exist, while U.S. carriers and amphibious forces roamed at will across the Pacific Ocean, attacking Japanese-occupied islands.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Death Ridges of Peleliu
programme.desc: The First Marine Division forged a ferocious struggle with the Japanese at Peleliu. It would take 74 days and cost 10,000 American lives but the blood and courage of this small band of heroes would ultimately break the back of the enemy.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Closing the Ring
programme.desc: By late summer 1944, the Allied forces in north-west Europe were thrusting towards the German border. Paris and Antwerp were liberated, but then supply problems brought the advance to a halt. Meanwhile, Stalin had halted his main thrust towards Berlin.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: SAS vs. Rommel

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Strike From the Sky
programme.desc: British light infantry must crash land by glider in Northern France then take and hold two key bridges in the hands of a heavily armed enemy.

programme.title: Against the Odds: A Chance in Hell: The Battle of Ramadi
programme.desc: When Colonel McFarland arrived in Iraq, Al-Qaeda had already declared Ramadi the capital of a new caliphate. The soldiers of McFarland's Ready First Combat Team fight to give American a victory.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Fighting Fox: Road to Hell

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Mountain Massacre

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Hitler's Last Bridge
programme.desc: A brave band of regular GI's are tasked with saving the last bridge and final gateway to the Third Reich. The bridge is bristling with German guns loaded with explosives. Worse, the enemy plan to destroy the bridge if the American unit assaults it.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Rangers Lead the Way
programme.desc: United States Army Rangers spearhead one of the biggest amphibious landings in history: the Allied invasion of France. They must scale vertical cliffs before facing the enemy, then destroy the guns that threaten to blow the Allied forces out of the water.

programme.title: Bullet Points: America's First War on Communism
programme.desc: Five years after the end of World War Two, the Cold War turns hot when America faces two communist giants in Korea and succeeds in keeping tyranny in check.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Weapons
programme.desc: The story of warfare in the modern age, from the legendary Spitfire to the stealth bombers of Iraq.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Battle for the Pacific
programme.desc: See how America recovered from Pearl Harbor and, in one year, achieved supremacy in the Pacific over the Japanese empire. Featuring highlights of the defining battles that turned the tide in the Pacific theater and led to victory.

programme.title: Top Ten Warfare: Inventions
programme.desc: From the mass production of life-saving Penicillin and pioneering Plastic Surgery, to the development of the Internet and GPS, this episode uses rare archive footage and expert interviews to identify and rank the most influential inventions of warfare.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: The Beach Gut
programme.desc: A couple transports a 60-year-old house to a plot of land near the beach in the hopes it can be transformed into the perfect beach getaway. Marnie must renovate the home while keeping its rustic charm from the 1960s.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: From Soaked to Saved
programme.desc: A couple has invested in a 50-year-old abandoned home in Dewey Beach, Delaware. They decide to hand the reins over to Marnie in the hopes she'll turn the fixer-upper into a safe vacation destination for their two boys.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Save It or Sell It
programme.desc: A couple loves Lewes and the cheerful home they own there, but their two daughters have outgrown the space. Now, the family's torn between selling the house or renovating it. Marnie tries to expand the home without losing its historic charm.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Captain's Paradise

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Big Family, Bigger Beach Home

programme.desc: A family with a new baby is bursting out of their cramped bungalow in Bethany Beach, Delaware. Marnie creates more space for the family by opening up the kitchen, relocating a laundry room and building magical bunk beds to accommodate the children.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: No Longer Grandma's House
programme.desc: After inheriting his family's Cape Cod cottage in Bethany Beach, Delaware, a man realizes it looks like grandma still lives in the home. Marnie plans to bring the house up to date by ripping out the old wood paneling and more.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Blown-out Beach House
programme.desc: A family with many fond memories of summer vacations in their Lewes, Delaware, beach house finds that their cottage's awkward layout isn't working. The space is maximized by vaulting the ceiling as well as adding an open-concept ground floor.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: A House Built on Sand
programme.desc: A couple's beach cottage in Dewey, Delaware, is just a few steps to the beach, but the house has no curb appeal and feels dated. They enlist Marnie to give it a face lift, but during demolition, Marnie finds that the foundation is sinking into the sand.

programme.title: Big Beach Builds: Sun Room to Fun Room
programme.desc: After years of pleading from their daughters, this couple has agreed to renovate their '90s themed house. Now it's up to Marnie to bring their house into the 21st century and make it comfortable enough for three generations.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Backyard Beachside Blowout in Emerald Isle, North Carolina
programme.desc: After years of visiting Emerald Isle, North Carolina, with their three kids, Matt and Megann are ready to buy a weekend getaway home at the beach. After finding a fixer-upper in their budget, they have $50,000 to create a luxurious outdoor space.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Makeover in Margate, New Jersey
programme.desc: Sharon hunts for a beachfront home where she and her kids can rediscover the magic of the Jersey Shore. With a tight budget and a big wish list, they hope to pull off all the renovations and create the family retreat of their dreams.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: On the Hunt for a St. Pete Beach Retreat in Florida
programme.desc: After vacationing in St. Pete Beach, Florida, for many years, a couple purchases an older condo in a prime location that needs a total gut job. Managing a long-distance project from their home in New York poses a challenge, as does the budget.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Oceanfront Oasis
programme.desc: Outdoor enthusiasts Nick and Krystin are looking for an oceanfront property in Jacksonville Beach, Florida.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Portland (Maine)
programme.desc: Adam Richman visits the land of lighthouses and lobsters: Portland, ME. His main event awaits him at the Tradewinds Café where he'll take on the Manimal Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Fargo, ND
programme.desc: Casey’s eating adventure takes him to Fargo, North Dakota for a hearty European take on a cheesy classic, a breakfast-dessert mash up, and the Boiler Room’s Hot Dish Challenge – a massive Midwestern meal made for the entire family…or just one man.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Deadwood, SD
programme.desc: Casey's nationwide nosh brings him to Deadwood, South Dakota. He's in this Black Hills outlaw town to go back in time at an old west saloon, chow down on a fried state staple and tackle one tough hombre.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Scottsdale, AZ
programme.desc: Casey’s culinary quest brings him to Scottsdale, Arizona where he’ll fry up a Latin staple, take on a stone age feast, and take on a four-pound deli platter in the Chompie’s Day at the Deli Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Absolute Cheesiest
programme.desc: Casey’s criss-crossed the country chowing down on the best eats American has to offer, and its time to honour the best of the best by inducting the top five absolute cheesiest dishes in Man vs. Food history into our Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Denver
programme.desc: Adam visits the Mile-High City for burgers with enough toppings to fill a dartboard, some Rocky Mountain oysters, and a showdown with the biggest burrito in the West.

programme.title: Christmas Chowdown
programme.desc: Carla Hall has her table set for a food-filled holiday. Whether it's a Christmas tree made from a tower of waffles, a turducken turned into a mammoth po' boy or even the entire Feast of the Seven Fishes atop one pizza, 'tis the season for eating!

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Holiday Delights
programme.desc: Nothing says 'Happy Holidays' like having all your favourite festive foods in one place. Brad Miller finds the Yuletide spirit with his favorite holiday steak from Harry's Savoy Grill in Wilmington, Del.

programme.title: Southern and Hungry: The New South
programme.desc: Damaris Philips and Rutledge Wood are all about mixing old traditions with new flavors in the mountain town of Asheville, North Carolina. Nestled in the Appalachian Mountains, Rutledge and Damaris discover hip, true-to-the-region cooking.

programme.title: Southern and Hungry: The Dish On Charlotte
programme.desc: Damaris Philips and Rutledge Wood get their southern food tour rolling in a growing city with an emerging food scene rooted in tradition: Charlotte, North Carolina! Their first stop is at Brooks' Sandwich House.

programme.title: The Bobby and Damaris Show: Gaming and Grubbin'
programme.desc: Bobby and Damaris make game day bites. Damaris prepares her dill Benedictine dip while Bobby makes his spice-rubbed chicken breast and piquillo white bean hummus. Damaris scores big with her buffalo blue cheese pork wings and a mint julep fruit salsa.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Luck of the Irish
programme.desc: Bobby's recent trip to the Emerald Isle was clearly on his mind, when he came up with his succulent and savory Irish style brunch menu. Bobby creates a bountiful family style platter filled with some of Ireland's favorites.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Brunch on the Run
programme.desc: A busy weekend schedule doesn't prevent Chef Bobby Flay from enjoying the brunch experience, even on the go. Take anywhere dishes include cinnamon sugar French toast sticks with maple cream, and a pressed egg sandwich.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Big Apple Brunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay takes a little inspiration from his hometown to create a versatile and delicious 'Big Apple' brunch. His apple-themed menu features irresistible apple cider donuts, apple sauce parfaits with yogurt and crispy quinoa, and eggs benedict.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Far East Meats Wild West
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, Nev., Michael Symon tackles towering burgers piled with spicy Korean pork bulgogi and juicy pork belly pastrami. In Denver, a modern-day sloppy joe is loaded with iconic brisket burnt ends. Finally, a fusion spot in Tulsa serves lamb-chili.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Stuffed, Spicy and Cheesy
programme.desc: In Queens, N.Y., Michael Symon gets in touch with his Greek heritage with a classic lamb and feta cheeseburger, and then he sinks his teeth into an Italian-style burger stuffed with smoky mozzarella and prosciutto.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Symon's Cleveland 'que
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in his hometown of Cleveland, Ohio, at his very own restaurant where he enjoys a tender, juicy and hulking pastrami beef rib and a gets a special look at his grandfather's recipe for scratch-made spaetzle and spicy sauerkraut.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Build Your Own Burger
programme.desc: Chef Michael Symon starts at the ultimate custom burger bar in Providence, Rhode Island, where he chooses from over 400,000 topping combinations to create his own meaty masterpiece.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Million Dollar Baby Cakes

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Children of the Corn on the Cob

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Point Break-Fast

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Deliciously Doughy

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Return of the Mac
programme.desc: Noah Cappe digs in to seven ooey-gooey versions of the classic American casserole. Whether it's stacked in a sandwich, layered in a hot dog, rolled into a taco or topped with lobster, these mac and cheese creations are crave-worthy carnival treats.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Other Bin of Scrooge McDuck!
programme.desc: Lena uses Webby to infiltrate the vault where Scrooge keeps all his most dangerous artifacts.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Last Crash of the Sunchaser!

programme.title: DuckTales: The Shadow War!

programme.title: DuckTales: The Town Where Everyone Was Nice!

programme.title: DuckTales: Storkules in Duckburg!

programme.title: DuckTales: Last Christmas!

programme.title: DuckTales: What Ever Happened to Della Duck?!

programme.title: DuckTales: Nothing Can Stop Della Duck!

programme.title: DuckTales: What Ever Happened to Donald Duck?!

programme.desc: Michael is troubled by rumours about Dunder Mifflin, and forces the office into a day of strange diversions. Andy figures out that the chief obstacle he has to overcome is his own awkwardness.

programme.title: South Park: Scott Tenorman Must Die
programme.desc: Cartman is excited that he has finally entered puberty when he gets pubes of his very own. After the other boys explain that pubes don't count unless you grow them, Cartman realizes he been tricked and sets in motion a dastardly plot for revenge.

programme.title: South Park: Over Logging
programme.desc: One day the citizens of South Park wake up and find the Internet is gone. When Randy hears there may still be some Internet out in California, he packs up his family and heads west.

programme.title: South Park: Terrance and Phillip in 'Not Without My Anus'
programme.desc: Terrance and Phillip must travel to Iran to save Terrance's little daughter, Sally. While they are gone Saddam Hussein takes over Canada, leaving Terrance and Phillip to save the entire country.

programme.title: South Park: The Tooth Fairy's Tats 2000
programme.desc: When Cartman discovers the Tooth Fairy is paying a premium price for lost teeth, he and the boys seize the opportunity to make some cash.

programme.title: South Park: Gnomes
programme.desc: Cartman, Stan, Kyle and Kenny are assigned to write a report with Tweek, the very nervous and highly caffeinated boy who insists gnomes are stealing his underpants.

programme.title: South Park: Elementary School Musical
programme.desc: The boys must embrace the latest fad to hit South Park Elementary or risk their status as the coolest kids in school.

programme.title: South Park: Trapped in the Closet
programme.desc: Scientologists converge on Stan's house after he is identified as the reincarnation of L. Ron Hubbard. One A-lister locks himself in the closet and refuses to come out, after Stan criticizes his 'talent.'

programme.title: South Park: City on the Edge of Forever (Flashbacks)
programme.desc: A freak accident leaves the Elementary school bus teetering precariously on the edge of a cliff, and it's up to Ms. Crabtree to find help. While they wait, the kids reflect on their adventures and how they got out of so many 'sticky situations.'
