programme.title: Movie: A Very Charming Christmas Town
programme.desc: A city girl and travel and lifestyle blogger goes to the little town of Solvang for her next holiday vlog piece after Solvang is voted Most Christmassy Town in the USA.

programme.title: Movie: A Christmas in Tennessee
programme.desc: A bakery owner must thwart a charming real estate agent looking to buy up her small town.

programme.title: Movie: Spotlight on Christmas
programme.desc: Dumped two weeks before Christmas, an actress secretly returns to her tiny hometown to hide out. What she doesn’t expect is meeting a charming new guy.

programme.title: Movie: The Christmas Edition
programme.desc: It’s Christmas, and an up and coming journalist finds that her life is at a crossroads. Then, she finds an unexpected opportunity: a small-town newspaper in Alaska is being given away for free to anyone who agrees to keep it running.

programme.desc: Life Outreach International encourages the support of missions and relief programs around the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Movie: A Crafty Christmas Romance
programme.desc: The owner of a craft and hobby store discovers an old copy of 'A Christmas Carol' among donations. In the book is a letter to Santa from 70 years ago and a valuable coin, so she sets out to find the owner with the help of the man who donated it.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas on Ice
programme.desc: A former champion figure skater, who runs the city's outdoor skating rink, falls in love with an unlikely benefactor.

programme.title: Movie: Candy Cane Christmas
programme.desc: A girl searching for a new tradition to lift her holiday spirits realizes that it’s not the traditions we cherish, but the people we spend them with. And, while preparing for her new tradition, she stumbles upon the final thing her Christmas was missing.

programme.title: Movie: A Welcome Home Christmas
programme.desc: A woman is paired up with a recently returned vet to recruit other veterans and active military personnel to help with the town's Army toy drive for Christmas.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The O.J. Simpson Case: Other Killer Theories
programme.desc: New theories emerge in the O.J. Simpson case, including a serial killer's confession and a possible hit man who claims responsibility for the murders.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Yosemite Murders: The Missing Women (Part 1)
programme.desc: When in 1999, young women mysteriously disappear from Yosemite National Park, investigators determine foul play and a prime suspect emerges, then escapes.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Yosemite Murders: The Evil Side (Part 2)
programme.desc: The key suspect in the murder of young women in Yosemite National Park is caught, but it’s up to an exceptionally skilled FBI agent to dismantle his web of lies and denials to draw a confession.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Aaron Hernandez: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Aaron Hernandez is a star player for the New England Patriots, and is set up for greatness. But after a body is found riddled with bullets a short distance from his home, forensic evidence soon ties Hernandez to the killing.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: George Michael's Final Days
programme.desc: George Michael's life as international super star came to a mysterious and tragic end on Christmas Eve 2016. Family and fans were shocked by his sudden death. What happened the night he died?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Oily in the Morning
programme.desc: Police recover a submerged car, but don't find the missing man they were looking for.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gold Rush
programme.desc: A man calls 911 saying his girlfriend shot herself, but the autopsy reveals that the gunshot wound was not self-inflicted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Key Evidence
programme.desc: An Illinois community is outraged when an off-duty police officer is shot and killed. Police are able to key in on a suspect and with the help of a gunshot residue expert and trace evidence expert make sure their killer pays for his crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Gambler
programme.desc: To solve a case of triple homicide, investigators have to delve into the world of high rollers and offshore betting. With the help of forensics, they are able to bring down a killer who gambled, and lost.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Safe Place
programme.desc: A wealthy man is gunned down outside his Louisiana home. His wife tells a tale of three masked men emerging from the shadows, but she may know more than she's saying.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Live Wire
programme.desc: A thin piece of wire and some cryptic numbers on a sales receipt held the key to a brutal and senseless murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Head Games
programme.desc: To celebrate one year of marriage, a young couple goes on a camping trip. When the husband is shot and killed, the wife is so distraught she gives two different stories of what happened. When forensic psychiatry intervenes, the truth is finally learned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Making the Collar
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl goes missing, and nine months later, her body is found. Forensic scientists narrow it down to a postal worker with a dog and red carpet, just with the evidence found on the girl's body.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Financial Downfall
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman is found dead after what seems like a tragic, accidental fall over a cliff. After a closer look at photographs from the scene, police get a new, more sinister theory about the young woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Daughter's Journey
programme.desc: A woman still haunted by her mother's disappearance 20 years before, decides to investigate herself. She finds her mother's old diary and discovers a grisly family secret that could explain just what happened to her mother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday School Ambush
programme.desc: Forensic science helps investigators unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Penchant for Poison
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths proved to be serial murders. The killer had been careful; he used poison which has no taste or odor. Fortunately for investigators, it also had a unique chemical signature.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bump in the Night
programme.desc: Investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside a victim's home that they hope will lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Searching
programme.desc: It's not only a fingerprint which can link a killer to a crime; a shoe print can be just as telling. Armed with little else, police hoped the shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation back on track.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: A pipe bomb explodes in a house, killing a man and wounding his mother. Police use a lot number on a battery and a mailing label to track down the bomber, and determine his motive.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death by a Salesman
programme.desc: Even though there were no witnesses, police manage to track down murderer less than 12 hours after the fact. Using fingerprints at the scene and security camera footage, officers arrested the perpetrator even though he was out of the state, on a bus.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Web of Seduction
programme.desc: When the scene of a murder proves to be completely bare of evidence, computer forensics experts manage to dig up files on the victim's computer, and those of his wife and her lover that finger a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grounds for Indictment
programme.desc: When police have trouble pinning a suspect to the scene of the crime in a deadly drive-by-shooting, even after investigating cell phone calls and shell casings, they turn to the dirt in the perpetrator's tires.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Death by the Bayou
programme.desc: In Louisiana, a disabled teenager is sentenced to death, but the discovery of hidden eyewitness interviews casts new light on his confession.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: The Boy's Story
programme.desc: A money order salesman is brutally murdered and two teenage brothers and their best friend are arrested. They spend almost four decades behind bars, until a journalist takes notice of the case and uncovers evidence of the men’s innocence.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Innocence and the Intern
programme.desc: An elderly white widow is brutally murdered in Greenwood, S.C., and Edward Lee Elmore, an African American handyman, is quickly found guilty and sentenced to death. A tenacious legal intern comes across the case and tries to save him.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: A Woman Wronged
programme.desc: A man is found dead in his home. His 19-year-old son names his hospitalized mother, Michelle Byrom, as the mastermind of the murder. A team of lawyers unearths a history of violence, and a confession that points to an alternate suspect.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Cruel and Unusual: Botched Executions
programme.desc: Lethal injection has experienced a series of botched executions in several states including Ohio, Arizona, and Oklahoma.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Bad Ass Bronco
programme.desc: With the Bronco over-budget and past deadline, Richard's patience and wallet are severely tested. He sells a '36 Ford three-window then considers a dare to sell his beloved Shelby Mustang. Sue is not amused with Gas Monkey's birthday gift to her.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Frankensteined Ford
programme.desc: The guys put a '68 Ford F-100 truck together by combining parts from other cars that shouldn't go together. Rich relives his youth with a '77 Trans Am Firebird.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America: Texas vs Black Sheep Pt 1
programme.desc: A windy and dusty night on the streets of Wyoming creates challenging racing conditions for powerhouse teams Texas and Black Sheep Mafia. And with $20,000 and the chance to move on up for grabs, one veteran racer pushes the limits of the road too far.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Full Throttle: Texas vs Black Sheep Pt 2
programme.desc: With added scenes and bonus features: Dusty roads continue to plague teams Texas and Black Sheep Mafia as the second around of their battle in Wyoming begins.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America: NE vs. NOLA
programme.desc: Kye Kelly's NOLA racers and Chris Rankin's team from the Northeast prepare to face off in the second matchup of round two where the winner gets a shot at Black Sheep Mafia. BSM then tunes up for their final grudge race matchup with NOLA.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Shine On You Crazy Diamond
programme.desc: Ryan Martin looks over his car while Chief and Dave push each other in a competitive testing session, as they all get ready for another chance at number one. At race time, the racers fight to move up the list until broken cars slow everyone down.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America: NE vs. NOLA
programme.desc: Kye Kelly's NOLA racers and Chris Rankin's team from the Northeast prepare to face off in the second matchup of round two where the winner gets a shot at Black Sheep Mafia. BSM then tunes up for their final grudge race matchup with NOLA.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Shine On You Crazy Diamond
programme.desc: Ryan Martin looks over his car while Chief and Dave push each other in a competitive testing session, as they all get ready for another chance at number one. At race time, the racers fight to move up the list until broken cars slow everyone down.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Trucker's Dream
programme.desc: The Hiltz Auto Company team pulls out all the stops for a local trucker with a dream. Using Chad's vintage toys as inspiration and utilizing Colton's improved welding skills, the team converts a '34 Oldsmobile sedan into a unique, functioning dump truck.

programme.title: Bad Chad Customs: Hot Rod From Heaven
programme.desc: The 10th-Annual Rockabilly Weekend car show is right around the corner and Chad has big plans for this year's raffle car! The team races to transform a rusted-out '38 Ford into an open-motor, fenderless hotrod that's guaranteed to sell tickets.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: The Harris Bloodline
programme.desc: On the 10th anniversary of Captain Phil Harris' final season on the Bering Sea, Josh Harris makes a personal journey to rediscover what made his father a legend, and embrace the legacy he inherits as Phil's son and co-captain of the Cornelia Marie.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: The Harris Legacy
programme.desc: The discovery of mysterious fishing charts on the Cornelia Maria leads co-captains Josh Harris and Casey McManus to Hawaii to learn what Josh's late father, Captain Phil Harris, was attempting to accomplish decades ago.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: Proving Grounds
programme.desc: Josh, Casey and Jeff travel to the southern edge of Kona's fishing grounds a spot Phil Harris frequently explored. Despite the rough waters and unpredictable weather, the trio dives into Kona's shark-infested waters to learn what kept Phil coming back.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: Ohana
programme.desc: Josh and his crew get an opportunity to supply ahi and mahi to a local restaurant and hope Phil's notes will lead them to a big payday. It's their first chance to turn a profit but if they want to succeed, they must first learn the Hawaiian way.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: Cowboys and Pirates
programme.desc: On Hawaii's Big Island, Josh enlists the help of Johnathan Hillstrand to help him dive deeper into the mystery of Phil's charts and gain insight into the time Phil spent in Kona Town.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: All-Nighter
programme.desc: Inspired by Phil's love of history, Josh, Casey and Johnathan Hillstrand brave unknown waters in the dead of night to try their hand at the ancient Hawaiian Ika-Shibi fishing technique.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: The Legacy Continues
programme.desc: With only two days left before they must head back to Dutch Harbor for King Crab season, Josh and Casey have one last goal to achieve in Hawaii: land a big marlin, the one fish that eluded Phil Harris decades ago.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Unexpected Offer
programme.desc: Mike and Jerry confront Daniel about how their rival's liquor is invading their territory. Tickle, Henry and Kenny scale up their CBD-infused moonshine operation. A new bootlegger makes Mark and Digger an offer they can't refuse.

programme.title: Moonshiners: The Marvelous Mrs. Tickle
programme.desc: Tickle gets a life sentence and Appalachia turns out for his first walk down the aisle. Mark and Digger risk delivering strong shine and sweet justice. Josh smashes obstacles that stood in his way all season. Mike gets a taste of his own medicine.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Deck the Stills: The Gifts of Hard Times
programme.desc: Mark and Digger unearth a load of free ingredients, Tickle and Josh build a submarine still farm and Mark designs a backwoods column still, perfect for endless runs of high-quality, low-cost liquor.

programme.title: My Crazy Obsession: Christmas Collection 2
programme.desc: Follow four Christmas fanatics as they reveal the amount of time, money and effort they put into their obsessions all year-round.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: The 12 Pops of Christmas
programme.desc: Dr. Lee tries to help all her patients look their best before the holidays. Her office is decorated in all the holiday trimmings, and her elves are hard at work remedying her patient’s skin issues.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Nose No Bounds
programme.desc: April is covered in bumps that have disfigured her arms. Genner has flown all the way from the Philippines to have Dr. Lee help with his bumpy nose. Chris suffers from psoriasis that nearly covers his body and a bump on his head.

programme.title: The Family Chantel: Wedding Crashers
programme.desc: It's Royal and Angenette's wedding day, but all eyes are on the Family Chantel. In the Dominican Republic, Alejandro makes a promise to Nicole that she needs him to keep in order to prove her mother wrong.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Happily Ever After?: HEA Strikes Back! Tell All
programme.desc: Colt, Debbie and Jess relive the Tell All. Kalani and Asuelu rehash arguments from the beginning of quarantine. Elizabeth and Andrei defend each other. Tania and Syngin recall old fights. Angela and Michael keep talking about having a baby.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Season's Squeezings
programme.desc: 'Tis the season for squeezin' as Dr. Lee and her staff fa-la-la-la-POP their way through the day! With lumpy lipomas and cysts-a-plenty, they'll have their hands full during one of their busiest days of the year!

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Under the Mistletoes
programme.desc: Dr. Schaeffer, Dr. Haller and Dr. Vincent deck the halls and hang the mistletoes in this special episode filled with holiday cheer and shocking new cases.

programme.title: Four Houses: Deck the Halls
programme.desc: In New York, Marie puts her refined holiday decorations up against Kevin's Christmas light spectacular.

programme.title: Four Houses: Home for the Holidays
programme.desc: Florist David puts his California ranch up against math coach Marcy's bay front home, software company CEO Andrew's Spanish colonial and stay-at-home mom Tanja's Tuscan villa.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Dazed and Gown-fused
programme.desc: Bride Nicole comes in with a very specific style of dress in mind, but discovers it may not suit her. Indecisive Katy has already tried on 50 gowns elsewhere and still doesn't know what she wants. Cy can't choose between two perfect dresses.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: The Quest for Perfection
programme.desc: Actress Laurel is on tour with the musical 'Wicked,' and she wants a dress that doesn't resemble her stage costumes. Picky bride Kea has already tried on more than 100 dresses! Mackenzie worries her beach dress will be too short to cover her bare feet.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Big Brother Hits Kleinfeld
programme.desc: A bride and groom from 'Big Brother' shop together, social media pro Kristin must look perfect, and Chef Cat Cora gets married.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Let Me Show Y'all How It's Done
programme.desc: Monte's BFF is shopping for her wedding dress. He's not the only man who thinks he knows what's best for the bride. Bride Marcia's uncles are strictly 'team sparkle,' but mom's preference for simple might be an obstacle.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Way Out of My Comfort Zone
programme.desc: Consultant Melissa is a last-minute fill in for no-show Mollie and is excited to discover her bride is Miss America. Meanwhile, a wounded warrior, Joan, struggles with seeing herself in a form fitting dress.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Cole and Angelique
programme.desc: Cole enlists his ex-girlfriend to help on a vital shopping trip, but her antics in the store impede his haul.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Missy and Amy
programme.desc: Missy plans to make over $50 using coupons; Amy plans to buy over $400 worth of groceries for under $10.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Adrienne and Sarah
programme.desc: Alabama minister and couponer Adrienne spreads her love of couponing to her congregation and tries to convert a skeptical friend into a coupon believer. In New Hampshire, 14 year old couponer Sarah controls all of her family's grocery shopping.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Michelle and Tyler
programme.desc: Michelle uses her coupon savings to build a dream home for her family. College student Tyler hopes to impress his mom with his couponing skills.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Are You Serious?
programme.desc: Hoarding has destroyed Carol's relationship with her daughter and she has one final chance to clean up. Amy's years of collecting have turned into a massive hoard.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: You're Not Taking My Kids
programme.desc: When Child Protection Services removes Karen's children from her home, she is given just 48 hours to clean up or risks losing custody of her kids permanently.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: A Humongous Secret
programme.desc: When Dennis quit drinking, a new compulsion took over, hoarding, and he is now in severe debt. Monte has accumulated a massive, couture-clothing hoard, and destroyed a relationship with her son.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Worst I've Ever Seen
programme.desc: The city is threatening to demolish Caryn's home; Theresa puts her stuff before her children in their greatest time of need.

programme.title: Movie: Four Brothers
programme.desc: After their adoptive mother is murdered during a grocery store robbery, four brothers reunite to track down her killer.

programme.title: Movie: Bad Boys II
programme.desc: Narcotics detectives Mike Lowrey and Marcus Burnett have been assigned to a high-tech task force that is investigating the flow of designer ecstasy into Miami. Their inquiries inadvertently lead them to a major conspiracy involving a vicious kingpin.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Kevin Hart
programme.desc: On a special hour-long episode, the show becomes Hartdiculousness as comedy superstar Kevin Hart joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo to talk about his new movie 'Night School'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CLXXX
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel, and Steelo fall from trees in 'human leaves', get hurt in reverse in 'back up', and get ready to throw down with some 'fight foreplay'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Jason Aldean
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo welcome country music megastar Jason Aldean as they head on down some 'dirt roads', bring a glass of water to a bunch of 'whiskey drowners', and witness the nightmare of 'bad dream houses'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CCXLIX
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel, and Steelo watch out for unseen danger in slamodlage, flap wings with some BIG BIRDS, and play a few holes of full contact golf.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Lauv
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo welcome music sensation Lauv to talk about fighting modern loneliness, kids who are running up the bill, and people who are doing nothing but making it worse in a relationship.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CCV
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo try to extinguish some people who have been 'fire worked', breath through their mouths with 'nose thank you' and celebrate festival love with 'concert connections'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Mike Holston
programme.desc: "The Real Tarzan" Mike Holston and some special guests join Rob, Steelo, and Chanel as they check out some "Risky Jobs," say "Arach No Thank You" to spiders, and head down under with some "Aussie Legends."

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: Night booting in Philly gets out of hand when Frank and Rob are ambushed by an angry heavy-hitter.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: At the lot, an irate father and son learn they can't escape their unpaid tickets.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: Garfield and Sherry face off with a man trying to block the boot.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: Yolanda helps a frustrated out of town couple try to recover their car.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: The insults get personal when Sonjia tickets an irate violator in Detroit.

programme.title: Parking Wars
programme.desc: Eric gets disrespected by a man who is angry at being ticketed next to his own house.

programme.title: Shipping Wars: What NOT to Expect When You're Expecting Jarrett
programme.desc: Jenn is bested by the heat, fatigue, and big expectations, but fares better than Jarrett where he almost crashes and burns a Vietnam era helicopter run.

programme.title: Shipping Wars: Big Pigs Fly, Little Pirates Cry
programme.desc: Samko finds herself in a stand off with a father during the move of a kid's handcrafted, pirate-themed playground.

programme.title: Shipping Wars: The Carney Code
programme.desc: Jarrett questions his ability to ship a very rare electric sports car cross country.

programme.title: Shipping Wars: Bidder Bee-ware!
programme.desc: Marc transports four million angry bees, and turns it into a battle of attrition. We also meet the Bodens, and the transporter couple from New Orleans ends up in a mess, literally, when they haul some pristine and not-so-pristine dollhouses.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Return of the Mogul's Return!
programme.desc: At an auction in Montclair, Ivy rakes in the dollar bills, while Darrell keeps things old school and finds something that will launch him to new heights. Also, Brandi worries Jarrod's hangover will get in the way of buying, and Dave just won't stay away.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Man in Black is Back
programme.desc: Everyone is shocked to see Dave Hester return to the auctions with a vengeance, but even the Mogul can't stop the buyers from scoring great units in Huntington Beach. Also, Darrell tries to get Brandon in 'tip-top' shape, and Ivy must change up his game.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Bunny Owns This Town
programme.desc: Jarrod and Brandi are determined not to let Dave distract them from a good score, while Darrell wants to find out more about the elusive Mogul. Dave shows up with even more bluster, and Ivy uncovers a treasure that promises adventure on the high seas.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Bowling for Brandi
programme.desc: Darrell and Brandon are excited to return to West Covina as it is a hidden honeypot for the duo. While it's off the beaten path, Jarrod and Brandi decide to follow Darrell's lead into the Inland Empire. Plus, Ivy searches for low level merchandise.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Bid Strong and Prosper
programme.desc: Dan Dotson returns to the auctions in Costa Mesa, where the buyers have their sights set on Dave Hester's home turf. Darrell and Brandon take the auction over the top. Jarrod and Brandi make a discovery that takes them where no bidder has gone before.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Hestered in the Highlands
programme.desc: The buyers head to the hills of Murietta for an auction that has tensions and prices running high. Dave angers Darrell so much that it leads to the Gambler doing something drastic. Ivy uses brains over brawn to score a locker.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Auction Boogaloo
programme.desc: The buyers welcome Rene and Casey back to the auctions with a healthy dose of badgering and competition. Dave heats things up and finds a piece of board game history. Darrell and Brandon show their moves outside of the auctions.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Locktoberfest!
programme.desc: Darrell and Brandon return to the site of their biggest score while the other buyers are focused on taking down the self-proclaimed 'King of Montebello.' Jarrod and Brandi land a locker that leads them to something called a 'Herbmeister.'

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Who made the call to give Murr a face full of slushie at the mall? How did the Jokers keep their props secret from each other before Laugh Man Standing? And whose breast milk did Pirate Sal chug?

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Quantum Mock-Anics
programme.desc: Find out which joker gets dizzy when a cab has a strong air freshener, who can speak Spanish, and which joker struggles to keep a straight face during Joe's 'expert' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Spider Man
programme.desc: Find out which of the jokers is the handiest, who hates the taste of beer, and how Q's love of animals beat out his arachnophobia and made for a better punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: Find out which joker once worked as a fish monger, who lied on his resume to snag a TV internship and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Swim Shady
programme.desc: The guys hit some bad reception working at a desk. Plus, tonight's big loser takes photos of a water aerobics class, but ends up drowning in shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: The guys take time to smell the roses, then pair up to double dip at the mall. Tonight's loser battles an undead enemy to save his family.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: The guys get drenched at a water park, and tonight's loser strikes out while jockeying for a ball from Mets pitcher Noah Syndergaard.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe compete in a focus group face-off, convincing people that their TV show ideas are the tops, and tonight's losers might get run out of town when they reveal their financial mismanagement plan to charity donors.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: The guys pitch toys that should be kept away from tots, face off at a market, and see sports at the mall. The big loser sticks his nose where it doesn't belong.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Moose Mayhem
programme.desc: To save a single mom and her daughter from rampaging moose and secure a source of food, Marty builds a bridge across a murky creek to access more property, Matt teaches predator deterrent techniques, and Misty builds a snow-proof greenhouse.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Burned Out

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Arizona Washout
programme.desc: In a first-ever Homestead intervention, a daughter pleads for help from the Raneys to rescue her mother and step-father whose failing homestead in Arizona sits in the crosshairs of deadly monsoon floods and a menacing cougar.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Hog Heaven and Homestead Hell
programme.desc: The Raneys answer an SOS from a family displaced by their failing homestead. Marty must move a cabin onto a flood-proof foundation. Matt teaches an ill mother how to face her fear of invasive hogs, and Misty crafts a rice patty garden in a flood zone.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Survival Shelter: The Greatest Challenge
programme.desc: The Raneys band together to save a family's crumbling log cabin after a devastating earthquake. In Ohio, a family is struggling to survive in their pest-infested, tire bale homestead and are in desperate need of Marty, Matt and Misty's help.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Survival Shelter: Against the Odds
programme.desc: The Raneys continue to salvage a family's tire bale home and work around-the-clock to provide fresh water and jumpstart an indoor garden. In Oregon, the Raneys build a family a viable water source by fabricating a solar still to de-contaminate the water.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Survival Shelter: The Greatest Challenge
programme.desc: The Raneys band together to save a family's crumbling log cabin after a devastating earthquake. In Ohio, a family is struggling to survive in their pest-infested, tire bale homestead and are in desperate need of Marty, Matt and Misty's help.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Killzone

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Fury and Fire

programme.title: Tanked!: DJ of Dragons
programme.desc: World famous DJ Steve Aoki wants to get Tanked. But this job will be way harder than pressing play; Steve wants a custom, 3-headed dragon on the verge of escape inside his tank.

programme.title: Tanked!: Wyclef's Tank is Ready or Not?
programme.desc: Brett and Wayde get called to New Jersey for a tank emergency for world famous music producer, Wyclef Jean. This founder of the legendary group the Fugees has not one but two tanks that could really use ATM's help!

programme.title: Tanked!: Nick Carter Wants His Tank That Way
programme.desc: Backstreet Boy and Dancing with The Stars finalist Nick Carter wants an aquarium for his Los Angeles home. A paddle boat theme seems impossible until Wayde finds one in the middle of the desert.

programme.title: Tanked!: 2 Chainz, 1 Tank
programme.desc: ATL's hottest rapper, 2 Chainz, is in search of an aquarium so he's contacted ATM. After Wayde loses some important measurements, he puts the pressure on Redneck to nail this tank and create a glowing Atlanta skyline underwater.

programme.title: Tanked!: Prince Royce's Royal Tank
programme.desc: Latin music star Prince Royce spices up his Miami mansion with a custom aquarium. Wayde and Brett struggle to make this tank as royal as possible but a last minute design change to the façade delays the build.

programme.title: Tanked!: Fish Flop Hip Hop
programme.desc: Wayde and Brett are building two centerpiece tanks for hip-hop megastar Akon's new dream house. Everything must be perfect before Akon can move in.

programme.title: Tanked!: Shark Byte
programme.desc: Wayde and Brett have a huge job on their hands, like 5000 gallons huge. Computer component manufacturer Samtec wants ATM to build them an aquarium unlike any other, a 20 foot long shark tank with exact replicas of their computer components inside.

programme.title: Tanked!: The Purr-fect Tank
programme.desc: Wayde and Brett build a 1500 gallon aquarium into the ceiling of a hotel restaurant in Florida. Then, in Seattle they build a tank for internet sensation Henri the Cat.

programme.title: Tanked!: The Amazing Piano Tank
programme.desc: Pianoworks in Rochester, NY wants Wayde and Brett to build them a piano of their own. This one is made out of acrylic and filled with fish of course.

programme.title: Tanked!: Triple Tank Throwdown!

programme.title: Home Town: The Church House
programme.desc: A minister and his wife are offered a clergy house, but the home is cramped with their family of seven. Ben and Erin share their vision for updating the space and show the couple the Collins House to give them a second, larger option.

programme.title: Home Town: The Littlest House
programme.desc: A business owner that's been living with her mom is ready to find a place she can call her own. With an all-in budget of $100,000, she's looking for a small home with a porch. Ben and Erin transform the house using breathtaking Americana charm.

programme.title: Home Town: Our Little Secret: Room to Grow
programme.desc: A couple with two kids are in desperate need of more space and hope to find a home with a big yard and studio for his work with an all-in budget of $200,000.

programme.title: Celebrity I.O.U.: Zooey Deschanel's Stunner for Her BFF
programme.desc: Actress Zooey Deschanel joins Jonathan and Drew Scott to surprise her best friend, Sarah, with a life-changing renovation. The family feels cramped after the arrival of their second baby, so Zooey and the Brothers give them a functional open concept.

programme.title: Celebrity I.O.U.: Allison Janney Gifts a Showstopper
programme.desc: Actress Allison Janney teams up with Jonathan and Drew Scott to give back to her assistant and close friend of 20 years, Ilana. Allison and the brothers flip Ilana's kitchen and dining room to create a stylish and functional space to cook and entertain.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Risky Business: Covered Costs
programme.desc: With pop-up facts and bonus footage, Tarek and Christina take a risk on an unseen house, but they soon discover it's been vandalized and the owners covered a gross pool. As more issues arise, Tarek and Christina worry they won't recoup their costs.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Small House, Big Problems
programme.desc: Tarek and contractor Izzy Battres take on a small house in Fullerton, CA. The seemingly easy flip becomes difficult when removing a wall creates a nightmare with the city and an unpermitted laundry room must be moved.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Big House, Big Budget
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take a risk on a huge home in pricey Anaheim Hills, CA, in hopes of making more money after sharing the profits.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Cliff Makeover
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take on a house in Anaheim, CA, designed by architect Cliff May. Having flipped a Cliff May house before, they're prepared to spend big for a mid-century makeover.

programme.title: Celebrity I.O.U.: A Mom Renner-vation!
programme.desc: Jeremy Renner is moving his mom to Los Angeles to be closer to her family. He calls on Drew and Jonathan Scott to transform her dated condo into a modern-meets-cozy oasis where she can entertain the family and host sleepovers with her grandchildren.

programme.title: Celebrity I.O.U.: Melissa McCarthy's Hero Home Makeover
programme.desc: Melissa McCarthy heads to Chicago to give back to her aunt and uncle, both retired cops. Melissa creates an upstairs retreat where her aunt can cook and entertain, and a downstairs man cave equipped with all the comforts her uncle deserves.

programme.title: House Hunters: Fast and Furious in Kansas City
programme.desc: A Missouri couple is excited to move back to their hometown of Kansas City. Their previous home two hours away has already sold, so their agent sets up several houses for them to see in a whirlwind weekend of house hunting.

programme.title: House Hunters: Dreams vs. Reality in Tampa
programme.desc: A young, newlywed couple living with her father searches for their first home in Tampa, Florida. She wants a single-level home that's near her family, but he's looking for the grand appearance of a two-story house with room for his suit collection.

programme.title: House Hunters: A Texas Sized Dispute
programme.desc: A couple wants a home closer to their jobs in downtown Dallas. But she's ready to spend big on a move-in ready home with luxury features, while he wants to save big and build some equity with a fixer-upper.

programme.title: House Hunters: Designing Dreams in New Jersey
programme.desc: A couple looks to get their kids out of the city and head for the upscale suburbs of New Jersey. They're looking for a large home with plenty of outdoor space, but she's a designer and wants a big renovation project while he wants something turnkey.

programme.title: House Hunters: California Dreaming in Redlands
programme.desc: A young family decides to make their dream come true and relocate to sunny Redlands, California. She's looking for a spacious two-story home with four bedrooms, but they're used to cheaper Illinois house prices and will have to compromise.

programme.title: House Hunters: Rustic Glam in Baton Rouge
programme.desc: A couple recently moved in together and now they're looking for a larger home in Baton Rogue, Louisiana. She's looking for a place that has lots of glam with plenty of closet space, but he prefers something more rustic with local New Orleans charm.

programme.title: Rock the Block: Bragging Rights: Master Suite Masters
programme.desc: Find out who earns the bragging rights as Leanne Ford, Jasmine Roth, Mina Starsiak Hawk and Alison Victoria tackle their master suites by knocking down walls and incorporating design touches.

programme.title: Rock the Block: Bragging Rights: The Kitchens
programme.desc: Find out who earns the bragging rights as Alison, Jasmine, Leanne and Mina add their signature styles to the "money maker" of the home: the kitchen.

programme.title: Windy City Rehab: To Sell or Not to Sell

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Sweet White Glove O' Mine

programme.desc: The crew prepares for the final chapter of the season, and with Joao sidelined with a fever, Travis is forced to step up. Bad weather rolls into the south of France leaving Sirocco stuck at the dock, adding more pressure on the interior team to perform.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Au Revoir, Sirocco
programme.desc: A boat catches fire in port stranding Sirocco with nowhere to go. The interior team grows resentful of Sandy's harsh criticisms, while Jack and Aesha contemplate their future off the boat.

programme.desc: After a caviar mishap, the primary’s 50th birthday dinner teeters on the edge of disaster, and Rachel finds herself embroiled in interior drama. As Shane’s career hangs on by a thread, Francesca’s frustrations with Elizabeth build.

programme.title: Below Deck: Never Before Scene: Runaway Chef

programme.desc: Captain Sandy and Kiko find themselves at a crossroad after a critical dinner, while Hannah fights to maintain control under the weight of a stressful season. On a guest excursion into Valldemossa, Rob and Jess up the ante in their relationship.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Shot Through the Heart, and Ibiza's to Blame
programme.desc: While Jess deals with a scary medical condition, Rob draws Malia’s ire by continuing to underperform on deck. During a wild crew night out in Ibiza, one relationship deeper while another goes off the rails.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Cool as a Cucumber
programme.desc: After a tumultuous night in Ibiza, Rob and Jess struggle to reconcile. Captain Sandy scrambles to avoid a catastrophic disaster after a mechanical error. A guest request sends a sleep-deprived Tom over the edge.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Bugsy prepares a naughty-themed evening for the guests. Tensions run high between Captain Sandy and Chef Tom. On a crew night out, Alex questions Bugsy about their relationship. Rob and Jess spend a romantic night in the guest cabins.

programme.title: Bible Secrets Revealed: The Real Jesus

programme.desc: Science and faith come together on a quest to trace Jesus' DNA. Geneticist George Busby and biblical scholar Pastor Joe Basile examine sacred artifacts at a variety of holy sites, extracting samples of the relics to uncover Jesus' modern descendants.

programme.title: God Code
programme.desc: St. Petersburg, Russia keeps watch over the Leningrad Codex, the oldest complete text of the Hebrew Bible in the world. Within its pages, antiquities expert Timothy Smith believes there lies an intricate code, one no present in later translations.

programme.title: The Last Pope?
programme.desc: Over 900 years ago, a Catholic saint, Malachy, received a prophecy regarding the identities of future popes, along with the end of the Papacy. Pope Francis, it seems, is destined to be the last pope, possibly signalling a coming apocalypse.

programme.title: Banned From the Bible
programme.desc: We scrutinize ancient writings that didn't 'make the cut' in the battle to create a Christian Bible in the new religion's first few centuries. Biblical archaeologists and scholars examine why they were left out and if others might yet be found.

programme.desc: After the NCIS team tracks evidence from the murder of a navy captain to Ducky's deceased mother, Ducky looks back and questions a pivotal life choice he made 37 years ago. Also, the team exchanges holiday gifts and Gibbs spends Christmas with Fornell.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Trigger
programme.desc: Intelligence suspects the leader of a local mosque is behind the bombing of an Army recruitment station. After a second explosion, Voight urges Halstead to follow the facts and not let his time in the service cloud his judgement.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Black and Blue
programme.desc: While CPD tries to take down a drug kingpin, Atwater faces a tough choice between doing what's required to solve the murder of a young dealer and what's best for the community.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Descent
programme.desc: In an attempt to dig himself out of a hole and save someone close to him, Antonio crosses a line that puts the entire team at risk.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Brotherhood
programme.desc: Voight and Ruzek lock horns over how to handle the aftermath of the Antonio situation. Meanwhile, a series of violent carjackings turns deadly, and Ruzek must rely on a C.I. he grew up with to help solve the case.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Trust
programme.desc: When a defense attorney is murdered after a fundraiser, Intelligence confronts the world of corporate finance which makes them reconsider their decision to back the current pro-police mayoral candidate.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Outrage
programme.desc: While chasing a heroin supplier, CPD crosses paths with a convicted criminal recently released on a technicality. Halstead's history with the man threatens the team's ability to put him back in prison.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Night in Chicago
programme.desc: Atwater goes undercover to bring down the longtime head of a criminal enterprise and becomes entangled in a situation that tests his allegiances as well as his conscience.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Amends
programme.desc: A police officer is shot in the line of duty and detectives race to the scene. Eames recognizes the victim: her husband's partner from the night he was murdered. Eames is forced to reinvestigate her husband's murder to solve the current murder case.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Seeds
programme.desc: When a fertility doctor is murdered, detectives initially believe pro-life activists are to blame but they soon uncover some well-buried family secrets that cause great suspicion.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Smile
programme.desc: A Park Avenue dentist's murder turns out to be connected to the death of one of his young patients. As detectives look into both deaths, they follow a trail of counterfeit and poisoned mouthwash from the streets of Harlem to the FDA and Wall Street.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Betrayed
programme.desc: Melissa Lewis disappeared leaving signs of a struggle and a strange orange mist behind her. Later, her boss went missing and left behind an even bigger mess, including a missing fortune. Two crimes leaving one lingering mystery.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Nightfall
programme.desc: After a young mom is found dead on the side of a country road, 40 miles from her Knoxville home, investigators scramble to figure out how she ended up there. Tucked away in her kitchen is a clue to unravelling the mystery.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Lost and Found
programme.desc: A 4 year old girl abducted and raised by her kidnapper spends decades trying to get back home and she finally does. Her story had many ups and downs but the ending was extraordinary. As it turns out that ending was only the beginning.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The House in the Woods
programme.desc: A hockey player finds his wife murdered in their home. His daughter says she saw a robber, but the killer's identity turns out to be far more complicated. Police had their suspects but her family had questions of their own.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Player
programme.desc: A double murder revealed a double life. The victims were a well-respected couple. Their son played poker for a living. His alibi was his ace in the hole. But when detectives found key evidence, they thought they were holding all the cards.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets in a Small Town
programme.desc: Her life ended in mystery on a dead-end road. A mother of three, she was beloved by her family and tight-knit community. For years the murder investigation went cold, however secrets have a way of eventually coming out.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Grift of the Magi
programme.desc: When a private company buys the school, Lisa discovers that it's a top toy company conducting research to design their hot new Christmas toy. Lisa and Bart go to investigate the company but are stymied by its security guard, Gary Coleman.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Skinner's Sense of Snow
programme.desc: The students and Principal Skinner find themselves snowed in at the elementary school.

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Yukon Vet: Mush Madness
programme.desc: In the days leading up to Dr. Michelle Oakley's work at a Yukon sled dog race, she handles a variety of patients, including some very fast sled dogs. On race day Michelle plunges in, examining a long stream of athletic dogs.

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Yukon Vet: Flying Caribou

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Yukon Vet: When Coyotes Attack
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes the Oakley's own backyard when a coyote attack puts Willow’s goat in critical condition.

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Yukon Vet: A Face Full of Quills

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Yukon Vet: Here Comes a Cari-Boo-Boo

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Dr. Strangeglove
programme.desc: The staff of Pol Vet Services has one head scratcher after another, from the peculiar to the downright bizarre. With over 19,000 clients, it's only a matter of time before the vets are presented with a unique case that they've never seen before.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Cowhide and Seek
programme.desc: Runaways, adventurists, and escape artists, the Pol's have their hands full, between bulls on the loose, and an attempted kitten getaway.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Barking Bad
programme.desc: Dr. Pol, Charles and Dr. Brenda tackle the problems of a feisty alpaca, a troubled twosome of dairy cows and a miniature donkey with a fungus problem on its feet.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Talk Turkey to Me
programme.desc: The birds are calling all the shots at Pol Veterinary Services when Charles adopts three turkeys that are on the run.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Temple of Terror
programme.desc: A mysterious explosion rocks the streets in Cambodia and it may be linked to a temple complex. Motorcyclists encounter what may be a legendary humanoid cannibal, and a cursed mineshaft could explain paranormal activity in a town's antique center.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: When Bigfoot Attacks
programme.desc: When cameras record a strange creature in the wilderness perform an incredible feat of strength, some suspect it's hard proof of Bigfoot; using cutting-edge science, experts investigate if they've discovered the spawn of Sasquatch and Iron Man.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Zombie Graveyard
programme.desc: Cameras capture something shocking in a cemetery: empty graves, as if the dead walked out in the middle of the night; using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate what's behind this apparent evidence of zombie activity.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Escobar's Ghost
programme.desc: Moments before Pablo Escobar's abandoned luxury building is demolished, cameras capture footage of a ghostly figure in the window, and some believe it was the notorious drug lord himself; experts investigate who this phantom was and what happened to them.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Alien Tower of Doom
programme.desc: Remote desert landscapes can't even escape the wintry magic of the Holidays as experts believe that bizarre towers of ice may have remarkable similarities to extraterrestrial formations found on Pluto's alien terrain.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Nazi Crop Circles
programme.desc: Crop circles spotted on an island in the Mediterranean might not be from aliens, but from a threat closer to home: Nazis; new discoveries help experts uncover who made them and for what sinister purpose.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Alien Ice Towers
programme.desc: When strange towers of ice are found growing from in a barren, water-starved desert, experts speculate why these structures have uncanny similarities to extraterrestrial formations recently discovered on Pluto's alien landscape.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Mystery of Skeleton Lake
programme.desc: A frozen lake deep in the Himalayas melts once a year to expose hundreds of human bones and a centuries-old mystery of astonishing carnage, leaving experts to speculate if it was a single catastrophic event or something much more sinister.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Nazi Crop Circles
programme.desc: Crop circles spotted on an island in the Mediterranean might not be from aliens, but from a threat closer to home: Nazis; new discoveries help experts uncover who made them and for what sinister purpose.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Revenge of the Zombie Killer
programme.desc: Experts make a chilling new discovery when they unearth a 30,000-year-old zombie virus from an icy grave. If this ancient disease is successfully resuscitated back to life, it could cause a catastrophic global calamity.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Wild West Apocalypse
programme.desc: Some of the world's most incredible engineering projects are now deserted. Explore what happened to a massive military site that was once a hotbed for nuclear testing, a top secret airbase hidden inside a mountain, and an otherworldly power plant.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Soviet Doomsday Device
programme.desc: Explore what happened to a classified Soviet machine built to prevent all-out nuclear war, a top secret Nazi facility, and a strange tower that left an enduring legacy.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Treasure of Outlaw Valley
programme.desc: Searching for a Gold Rush ghost town's legendary hidden treasure in the hills surrounding the town.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Amazon Ghost Town
programme.desc: An American ghost town in the Amazon jungle, a secret Nazi base, and a deadly concrete fortress 866 miles long are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Town That Disappeared
programme.desc: A haunted lighthouse on Lake Michigan, a town where everyone seems to have vanished all at once, and a secret complex of tunnels beneath London.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Nazi Doomsday Project
programme.desc: Brand-new evidence reveals the secrets of a Nazi program to build a nuclear bomb, and using cutting-edge science and tech, experts uncover classified files that reveal how close Hitler came to this terrifying superweapon.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Mystery at Alcatraz
programme.desc: Three inmates are said to have escaped from Alcatraz prison, but even today, it's never been proven. New evidence might finally crack this notorious cold case, as experts use forensic science and cutting-edge tech to investigate fresh leads.

programme.title: Conspiracies Decoded: Revenge of the Nazi Doppelganger
programme.desc: Startling new evidence suggests that Hitler's second-in-command was secretly replaced by a doppelganger to escape war crimes and impending justice; armed with cutting-edge forensic science, a team of experts investigates.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Egypt's Land of the Gods
programme.desc: New evidence from one of the world's oldest maps offers clues to a long-lost civilization of untold treasure, and this cutting-edge expedition might finally prove that this mysterious kingdom is the ancestral home of the ancient Egyptians.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Hunt for the Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: New clues taken from long-lost maps offer fresh leads in the hunt for the Ark of the Covenant, and using the latest hi-tech archaeological methods, experts retrace its steps through the Holy Land, Egypt, and Ethiopia to make a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Finding the Fountain of Youth
programme.desc: The legend of the Fountain of Youth might finally be explained by hidden messages encoded in a 500-year-old map, and using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts explore forgotten caves and perilous waters to reveal this mystery's long-lost secrets.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Mystery of the American Maya
programme.desc: New evidence suggests the Maya civilization did not suddenly vanish, but that they instead still survived, they just resettled in the United States. Using cutting-edge tech, experts reveal what really happened to these long-lost people.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Dancing with Death
programme.desc: Wife and mother of three Stephanie Roller Bruner has a wonderful life, so her disappearance days before Thanksgiving leads to a massive search. When information of a secret love triangle comes out, the case takes a drastic turn.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Sick and Twisted
programme.desc: Dana MacKay is found viciously beaten to death while her husband is out of town. One suspect comes to mind: a woman who's been stalking Dana for the last month. But it will take a cellphone with X-rated text messages to unravel this mystery.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: A Darker Shade of Blue
programme.desc: Chaos ensues in Fox Lake, Illinois when an officer is found dead. With a potential cop killer on the loose, the town is on lockdown. But when sordid details of the dead officer's secret life come out, the case takes a surprising turn.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Serial Deception
programme.desc: When dozens of women vanish from the sunshine state in the late 60s, they're presumed runways. It isn't until police discover the bodies of two missing teens that they uncover the sadistic work of a prolific serial killer.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Smoky Mountain Murder
programme.desc: A custody battle turns deadly as twin sisters craft a complicated, cross-country conspiracy to do-in the one person standing in their way as the children bear witness to the plan.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: The Patio Door
programme.desc: A bitter sibling rivalry takes a dark turn when one sister recruits a local gang to take part in a deadly game of pay back.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Some Kind of Monster
programme.desc: When Manjit Basra and Mukhtiar Panghali settle down and start a family, it seems like a dream come true. But this dream turns into a nightmare, with a heart-breaking ending that leaves everyone questioning what they thought they knew.

programme.title: Her Last Christmas
programme.desc: After a body is found in the stairwell of an upscale hotel, detectives identify her as Ashley Benson. Piecing together her love life and its relation to her tragic demise will bring secrets to the surface and leave a family in turmoil.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: The Patio Door
programme.desc: A bitter sibling rivalry takes a dark turn when one sister recruits a local gang to take part in a deadly game of pay back.

programme.title: Her Last Christmas
programme.desc: After a body is found in the stairwell of an upscale hotel, detectives identify her as Ashley Benson. Piecing together her love life and its relation to her tragic demise will bring secrets to the surface and leave a family in turmoil.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Smoky Mountain Murder
programme.desc: A custody battle turns deadly as twin sisters craft a complicated, cross-country conspiracy to do-in the one person standing in their way as the children bear witness to the plan.

programme.title: Relatively Evil: No Secret Is Safe
programme.desc: An early morning home invasion and double-murder appears to be drug-related, but when investigators speak to the lone survivor of the attack they discover a more sinister motive.

programme.title: Relatively Evil: Masked Motives
programme.desc: After dating a short time, Tyrone Coles asks Denise Gay to move in with him even though family members on both sides oppose this arrangement. A series of tense confrontations leads to a vicious murder and twisted cover up.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Tried to Prevent This
programme.desc: For 17 years, Kathy Swanson feared her son, Michael, would one day harm someone. For 17 years, she tried in vain to convince people that something about Michael was different until that dreadful day finally came that her worst nightmare came true.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Cop and the Killer
programme.desc: When Walt Chavis joined the police force, he was prepared to risk his life, but he never imagined the greatest threat he would face would be his own brother or that one day he would be forced to choose between his duty and his family.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Monster Inside Him
programme.desc: When Karen struck the deal that finally got her brother, Richard, out of her life, she didn't know he would turn his attention on another, his new wife, Vernetta. Neither woman realized the devastating impact Richard would have on both their lives.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Under His Thumb
programme.desc: Jamie Clark had already been twice unlucky in love, so when she met Anthony Lord she thought the third time would be the charm. But by the time she realized what perverted plans he had for her, she was already trapped.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: In the Lion's Cage
programme.desc: Linda Wittmier and Terry Jo Howard both fell in love with James Michael Randall. And both suffered when they discovered the monster that lurked inside him. But they never realized how lucky they were to survive his twisted sexual desire to kill.

programme.title: Homicide City: A Manager's Murder
programme.desc: Five months before restaurant manager John Thurberg is to be married, his fiance is devastated to learn of his murder at work. The motive is not initially clear, but when police question employees, they uncover a web of secrets and lies.

programme.title: Homicide City: Point Blank
programme.desc: The city of Philadelphia is in shock when hard-working mother Trish McDermott is gunned down on a Center City sidewalk. Detectives work around the clock to catch the killer, someone they soon discover is more dangerous than they ever could imagine.

programme.title: Homicide City: Killer Moves
programme.desc: When beloved a DJ, Alberto Martino, is found bludgeoned to death outside his radio station, it's appears to be a robbery gone wrong. But police quickly learn the Martino was not a random victim, but the focus of a carefully orchestrated homicide.

programme.title: Homicide City: Germantown Tragedy
programme.desc: When Asia Adams' body is discovered after a fire in her home, police are unsure if her death was an accident or arson. But when the investigation reveals the truly horrific nature of her murder, police find themselves pursuing an elusive killer.

programme.title: Homicide City: Bingham Street Blues
programme.desc: Northeast Philadelphia's Crescentville neighborhood is known for tranquility seldom seen in major cities. But when a mother, her boyfriend, and daughter are found slain at home, the community searches for answers.

programme.title: Hitler: The Opportunist
programme.desc: A look at the first three decades of Adolf Hitler's life unveils what transformed a down-and-out Austrian into the undisputed leader of the Nazi Party. We reveal the truth behind Hitler's time serving in World War One.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: A look at the mind of a dictator as Hitler tightens his grip on Germany and turns his sights to conquest. Experts investigate the key skills that enabled him to turn the tables on Europe's foreign leaders.

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: Hitler: The Monster
programme.desc: Having bathed in adulation and success for a decade, Hitler reacts when the tide of war turns against him. As he struggles to stay in control, expert analysis reveals the darkest arts of his personality, driven by his beliefs.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Transporting the Reich
programme.desc: At look at how Hitler's redesign of the German transport system was a key factor in his preparations for war, including how he used the car industry for the rearmament of his military and see his plans for a colossal rail system.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: High Hitler and His Nazi Supersoldiers
programme.desc: Newly discovered secret files reveal the huge drugs program that fuelled the Nazi war machine. Led by Hitler, himself possessed by narcotics, the German troops consume tens of millions of Crystal Meth tablets throughout the war, driving them to extremes.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Transporting the Reich

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: The New World
programme.desc: There is more to the explorers who discovered America than we have been told. Learn that Christopher Columbus never stepped foot in North America and Hernán Cortés didn't defeat the Aztecs by himself.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Booze and Bullets
programme.desc: Our memories of the roaring twenties and lawless thirties are more myth than truth. Learn the shocking realities about prohibition and that rogue's gallery of gangsters including John Dillinger and Bonnie and Clyde.

programme.title: Weaponology: Vertical Take-Off
programme.desc: The Vertical Take-Off aircraft are the most innovative weapons at present day.

programme.title: America's Most Badass: Rebels With a Cause

programme.title: America's Most Badass: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: John Glenn, Bruce Lee, Harry Truman and Hunter S. Thompson all lived life without boundaries and they all have one thing in common, they're badass Americans.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Verge of Destruction
programme.desc: We've all heard about the fallout shelters used for refuge during World War II, the deadly firebombing of Tokyo, and the D-Day invasion on the beaches of Normandy but there are more secrets.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Rebels With a Cause
programme.desc: Rosa parks was not the first African American women to refuse to give up her seat. The Berlin Airlift included candy for kids. One of the great rifles used in war was invented by a man who made moonshine.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Secret Weapons
programme.desc: Discover the unknown stories of some of the incredible plots, ploys and people behind America's secret weapons during the Cold War, the Vietnam War, and WWII.

programme.title: What History Forgot: To the Ends of the World
programme.desc: Delve into the unknown stories behind some of the biggest disasters, threats and conquests in America's skies. From the attack on Pearl Harbor, the Hindenburg disaster, Apollo 13 and the race to the Moon.

programme.desc: The Cold War might be long gone, but the nuclear threat has re-emerged. Meet nuclear preparedness enthusiasts as they dig their bunkers and stockpile supplies, determined to survive a threat that could become a global apocalypse.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin in Training
programme.desc: A couple purchased a quaint cabin with an accompanying railroad caboose. The team transform both spaces to create a camp by enlarging the main cabin with more sleeping space and indoor plumbing while the caboose provides more storage and bunk space.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Inspirations Brewing
programme.desc: When Chase and his brother-in-law learn that the owner of their latest cabin project works at Allagash Brewing Company, they're excited to check out the brewery for inspiration as they turn the weekend getaway into a three-season home away from home.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Building Alaska, the New Generation
programme.desc: A new generation of builders tackles the Alaskan wilds to build off-the-grid cabins. First-time builder Nick faces some harsh realities when he can't use the trees on his build site for lumber. Brannon's team develops a unique foundation system.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Hard Work Beats Talent
programme.desc: Reality sets in for first-time extreme cabin builder Nick Blanco in Alaska as he fights the tides trying to retrieve pylons for his foundation. Brannon's team gets stuck on the muddy trail bringing in more build materials.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Rain, Rain, Go Away
programme.desc: Rain and a muddy trail continue to slow down Brannon's cabin build, but despite their dampened spirits, the gang is able to haul the windows across the two-mile trail. Jere and Ben finally get the barge launched.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Home Stretch
programme.desc: All the builders are in the home stretch in Alaska as they try to finish their cabins. Jere and Ben install interior and exterior siding. Nick's roof is dried in, so he turns to finishing the sleeping loft.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Grand Finale
programme.desc: Nick's dad, Paul, returns to help put the finishing touches on the cabin. Brannon's team builds countertops and railings for the cabin, and his client arrives. Jere and Ben put in hard work finishing the new Sea Otter Sound Lodge.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Massive Mud Home
programme.desc: Summer and Jack moved away from New Jersey after getting engaged to live off the grid. They buy a plot of land in Sedro Wooley, Washington and have commissioned Sunray Kelley to design and build their dream mud home.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Modern Farmhouse
programme.desc: A family builds an ultra-modern farmhouse completely off the grid in the verdant Wisconsin countryside. When the project extends into winter, they're pushed to the breaking point as they face the impact of extreme cold on the build and themselves.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Colorado Crest
programme.desc: Builder Phil Parr heads to the wilderness of northern Colorado to build the ultimate off-grid tent. Far beyond simple nylon and poles, this lavish tent has a custom fabricated wooden frame, canvas shell and 650-square-feet of livable elegance.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Mountain Timber Frame
programme.desc: A man builds an off-grid timber frame cabin on his family's 100-acre property in upstate New York.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Manchester, New Hampshire
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels bring him to Manchester, New Hampshire, for an epic portion of barbecue that's served on a shovel at KC's Rib Shack. At local favourite Mr. Mac's Mac and Cheese, he only has eyes for their magnum opus.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Alaska
programme.desc: Casey's nationwide feast brings him to Alaska, where he cracks into crab legs fit for a king at Slippery Salmon Bar and Grill in Anchorage. In Talkeetna, he samples the local wild game, ordering a slab of reindeer meatloaf at Denali BrewPub.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Sensational Seafood
programme.desc: Armed with a serious love of food and years of experience in the restaurant business, Casey Webb travels the country in search of America's most delicious dishes and ultimate eating challenges.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Sizzling Southwest
programme.desc: Enchiladas, burritos, fajitas, ole! We're counting them down one by one, culminating in a Tex Mex Treat so stupendous, it's coming in at number one on the countdown.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Portugal
programme.desc: Andrew reveals Lisbon's iconic seafood, pork sandwiches, and custard tarts.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Sicily
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern samples Sicily's fried street eats, classic cannoli and unique pizza.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Providence
programme.desc: Andrew heads to Providence, RI, one of the oldest cities in America and home to a unique food scene. He savours authentic Portuguese-style seafood, discovers a refreshing take on New England pub food and is wowed by a one-of-a-kind tasting menu.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Pittsburgh
programme.desc: Andrew heads to Pittsburgh where new restaurants are building on old culinary traditions. He tries a vegan twist on pierogies, checks out the newest wave of local chef talent at the Smallman Galley and indulges in classic dishes from Spain.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Central New York
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern highlights the local favorites in central New York, finding beef and veal sausages at one of America's oldest hot dog stands, half-moon cookies that predate New York City's iconic black and white cookie and more.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Quebec City
programme.desc: Andrew scopes out the creative, rustic comfort dishes of Quebec City, Canada. Influenced by French and English settlers, the city is full of old world charm, late-night diners, hearty food and plenty of maple syrup.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Puerto Vallarta
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern heads to Mexico's Pacific coast and the resort town of Puerto Vallarta to explore the local cuisine. He finds local favorites reimagined to the delight of visitors, like grilled flour tortillas topped with marinated pork roast.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Porto
programme.desc: Andrew explores the classic comfort foods and modern recipes of Porto, Portugal, including salted and dried cod baked into a creamy casserole, white bean and tripe stew, octopus rice, sponge cake and Port wine.
